name: Kash Patel
subject: I hope this isn’t too personal
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmprrpehc5hn590e8pae3cg56fvbqntrufaj77so_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zglfkubuq2roep303f9mr2e0k59knd70b94ki9lg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrhci0sevfoitcdds1oquepfs3qa595f0ksj57v8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh44eimj9h3relipu82vu9fr4gqq641tdflt1i88_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)
[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zklvph05s7g92c45t2nj43gduo33av7feja9hie0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvqtbpd60ch43k2lfei9vtj0v6arfvphnkij5k3o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbom75vtk9nlugn6fot5cobjup16pqcg4qech0o0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp8vdtj7m8n2lg06l4587m3iqrsnkuu55k02mmno_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqp794rrad9uqns8u5p4v97d3nkm4lmp5ni16m1g_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcivrqi6cu2ch73mdandd7iou42d9bplqffmqnd8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)
[Donate $2,500 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2gkaldhtasbogk6pn39gj7k22h7cbi3e4s4tk1o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3f18q7c7gpm4o7ml449frskbjc277ljb6jp1dq8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

**P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles.**

I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots.

[Will you help me raise $45,000 before the end of the week to support the Kash Foundation? Click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv9bslok84fe2rnv53s79ie47159pfbbu9jgkefo_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphm9o34c3h2bs)

name: American Update
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666731%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bRDxakCjBMZ9bxfQZRIoJQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666732%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hpoROZqp3AeQ3BYUTvhYBA&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666733%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mr%2f5nGD8zdslcRgeAZ7M9g&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666734%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0Yx0z5hw7AJRrOISSr7hAw&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666745%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L4H6tvwKG1dQqcgOLahaow&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Update
---

Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.” What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty. Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvkjrrsabtr99rq3v3in9mdpqsebl4a5qcs08hd8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu133df0g73rjuvdkkpj1k8uftds9l3vl8gi3bm0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $25.59?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zti3ffphs1v7bgqu29r7sckp3k0pb6sgon068js8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z906n70pmdaqtnvh87meci18ntrm84991irgmnh0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpqqu8oat8jptkakjdeuq9tv6d79rp71uk620vho_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn7ifind9etq0q6tf412vq4e95keb824p7erbbkg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs) | | [Chip in $25.59 ➔](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkal7mti28umkq5s5e681m9t94cm9jlermpv44r8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zliuogd4eb9dclqoa61rg43osf4jh2pq4u2dkar8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbvepfoihmk9isk956utmjs4ng6j88k2raondp70_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z93tf65dlc69qj8m3d4pja6002hp3ktfaqdo4n00_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $25.59 -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdkk9qj3e8podqu6ea31lnuvcrml1ru20gb00tn0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zehrmc1s5309s7ohvkfkg2d53okj3ngvqpfr8ghg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za86tbj3hvr31ma872bh8vas3vhvi592e0pcjhmg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zoadjgn9fqlqnri5a038rejtgog7n486qknoq38g_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpo5gib1mfgkad5j921pat496i4usrmg0lt3hbjo_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Your America
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10898%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yHMvpzrsRmFu4zKtww7VoA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10899%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fds7ftVO7yN40b3cw51XVA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10890%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XceTpZCmaYPn64DDahr1Nw&sysid=1)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: American Defense News
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z94hlp6633ro5h08gndpdtbdddd4m5h02srhunhg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm0o76cjh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd6js908mmsgeqf8dt60hjdd9venm80p1h6tvkt8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm0o76cjh2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zun71tccsoa6a9qh632tbdifp8sshihbeich86gg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm0o76cjh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze6ginn0goppa59vpcv3ri3v2aidkpcdoqv21j98_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm0o76cjh2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zennfs04sicqm07fsubon627qqll3hhdprlivbho_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm0o76cjh2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Over 7,000 Republicans have already...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is why I am personally emailing you today.

| |
---
| | | Over 7,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8u0bvfhi4bt66f8gca81pcsdraeif4i9p70h0a0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cphmeoj5c3h2bs "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---

name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuav0kn3k8sd7ggpnnp499cdtglb913ugq48hqpo_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm4or5cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z61qrs5eqgm7ksno4dk1il0l1i6t5bjv286ddv4g_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm4or5cph2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za3aku5s681gug4iqsgfu3r913lrpq6h9dpo2p98_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm4or5cph2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

ICYMI News
---

Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. name: Secure & Prosper
subject: God Bless Mothers
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Fellow American, As Mother's Day quickly approaches, I hope you with join me in celebrating all the women who have chosen life! No matter what the circumstances on a baby's conception, each one of us are made in the image of God and deserve, if nothing more, a chance a life. I also hope you will join with me in pray and **_working towards an America that is fully and forever abortion free_** \- because the simple truth is Abortion Factories like Planned Parenthood want nothing more than to get rid of all our mothers by tricking them into slaughtering their own children. Fellow American, I've spoken with mothers who were tricked by the Abortion Cartel into ending the life of their unborn child and when I tell you the grief these women carry is nothing I would wish on my worst enemy. Can you image killing your own child because a satanic abortionist had tricked you into believing the old adage "it's just a clump of cells" - then years later when you realize what you've done and there is no way to take it back? Heart wrenching. I created Operation Rescue, Americas largest and most pro-found pro-life organization to do one thing - make sure no woman is stripped of her motherhood and ensure each unborn child is given a chance at life.
---
[**Help more Mothers choose LIFE**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
And I've paid dearly. A decade ago, I exposed Planned Parenthood for doing what I just described - tricking young women into killing their own children, as they continue to do today - and I also uncovered a horrifying truth. Planned Parenthood selling the body parts of aborted (murdered) children for profit. And despite never denying my video evidence or any of my claims - the UNJUSTICE system has allowed them to go after me for millions of dollars. It doesn't stop there. Planned Parenthood and their Abortion Cartel have also gone after me in even more sick and depraved ways. I've been alerted by not only local police but also the FBI of the growing numbers of threats against myself, my family, and the pro-life advocates who work with me at Operation Rescue. We've had to pay thousands of dollars in new security costs to make sure everyone stays safe. Nevertheless, I will not relent. I will not give in. Abortion MUST end in American and if I stand alone in fighting Planned Parenthood and the Abortion Cartel then so be it. Fellow American, but I'm not alone. I know through generous financial and spiritual support there are MILLIONS of pro-lifers just like you who are behind me, and I thank God for you every day. [**This Mother's Day, I hope you will help support the crucial work Operation Rescue and I do to make sure America has more mothers, not less by making a generous donation of $25, $50, $100, $500 or more right now.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._kYlUF_xIWIBXtkBxwQg0g)
---
[**Help more Mothers choose LIFE**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
God Bless America's Mothers!
---
Troy Newman President Operation Rescue
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._fGMxj2aqHbJCA)
---
[**Support Operation Rescue**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTI2LWQ3ZTgyYWNhNmFlODRjNzlhNjE0YTU5MzcwOTMwNGZkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/eIyhXoT2slRTgDZr4qMY9w) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: See the evidence for yourself
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10807%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AC3QxZP7F9neO4YSVgPDhg&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10808%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YF5l9tFsvuQogwIDqF2HbQ&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10807%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AC3QxZP7F9neO4YSVgPDhg&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10809%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9sUsSCREhxxgVFH1fZgC%2bA&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10807%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AC3QxZP7F9neO4YSVgPDhg&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10800%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rjHrqqlI5%2bTX%2fvjnlvSJFQ&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10801%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O2xZ71Ct0oiVmcMMddtHzA&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10802%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gnTx4kyqHiWY%2b%2fizQ24ZHQ&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he’s ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden’s Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden’s Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666742%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Nva2p78jaPpCjpoD6EcV1g&sysid=1)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666743%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3WjvxB3btazpM1WsrOsisg&sysid=1)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666744%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=brr7Uu4vIBsbmX38DOOB1A&sysid=1 "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

---
| | [REJECT BIDEN’S AMNESTY PLAN](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666855%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=74KUljRik7L9fFEEHW1jAw&sysid=1)
---

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666856%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aoHMynLD9Mo6E5E7szXOiA&sysid=1)
---
Kevin McCarthy
Speaker of the House

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79100%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EscevoWfFP%2fmHY31ygG1kg&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79101%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mtMAnTsi03CKbqHYYQetmw&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79102%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8CRBgYGLl8NflA2KIILpig&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79103%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bCfKa7eqrCwm1qcIDTB4%2bw&sysid=1)

National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Great American Update 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 |

body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9is6dlaug31121aoa0g1o6kp405h2sevcfmnc20_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb9ei3uu4ep6a58ie8gblbqqr050638866kck10o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $25.59?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs14imhmr087uio7mk3lkf8lr7jfttctquo616io_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdudj8m38sfqksp6rpcegiu65spb2fh538juosao_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcrd4kbhugn02v0s4fje4q4c2t3bblf3o6ljfmsg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpgn7q87ijkujdqccgujbf21lq9fs86vs4i3g03o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs) | | [Chip in $25.59 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2v9tvbcs0aov92arhrpidl91l30mpksc3g34rtg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8atg693nm7upt98jdb3uijcn6cemqmm35tjhfn0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmdq0fc3ag3kmt2s7a5ga4vhqb9ju9veg9m96i7g_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlqahinj1tjd213aqcta5bm8ln1e7gj0dfgo6lro_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $25.59 -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9uta6vjf5i2dh7enr7f2r35oq59n7k9mdmt63i8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znrks1m96sbgbfi8abs62ja9edugkl9effpaj3ug_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpjm1o35chh2bs)

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40f4042871764dfb8560285281547d2c&_e=xjE6DH4ZwVpADW6OTk8do6IFP2zucl_y6WPeGyjgMZrgA-sdxfuEEQrii8szOw91xresmSgKkaCidwaTUKgllThT3NMGVt1RS-oYZPoVs9qYcI_QLJTKVrB4iZLU0VIry3tQdBqrnhrQskui97HfNkZI2E9_Pf_xGGVPx3lfFOQuhmxMhcUmBy291l3_TzhYbYRjqbWbSODKn2wyJo9HXxoSOHhCdbrATVXWQshncGb-6GI32xZamaX0MKEfkynWnF6D-OqXYChFDUp8eQn32LAUCawZvitVbptzGWjEMDkqegctZ4vYJDoF9WKzCNF-) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40f4042871764dfb8560285281547d2c&_e=xjE6DH4ZwVpADW6OTk8do6IFP2zucl_y6WPeGyjgMZrgA-sdxfuEEQrii8szOw91xresmSgKkaCidwaTUKgllThT3NMGVt1RS-oYZPoVs9qYcI_QLJTKVrB4iZLU0VIry3tQdBqrnhrQskui97HfNtb9q1tVK5aaMZ_QSTIwi7FlGgM8vBuhVk2PkSpYT-57dq-ihy6-gr1VueM_bBUnBbRNoJbIrGbnA5XyVVhIQC1sSlkZvDPjguTZXJW0QE7ft7VfEzHTC5kSMWy9SWpIqanqh_YGAUjaaU9q6RdbbHWs9IHaK5XR0QHFEM5dtqBW) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40f4042871764dfb8560285281547d2c&_e=xjE6DH4ZwVpADW6OTk8do6IFP2zucl_y6WPeGyjgMZrgA-sdxfuEEQrii8szOw91xresmSgKkaCidwaTUKgllThT3NMGVt1RS-oYZPoVs9qYcI_QLJTKVrB4iZLU0VIry3tQdBqrnhrQskui97HfNqFcHI_5bLwBL6Qk9eZmTbcTAAc3U1vSFFtqoXDi9AnAAenCwKi1tieN3f3si13t11hlN_ACc_vPWqu1ViZDJKMBiXIs8hIPq3OJIdII3CRWz8zib5ZnpesLI1cBA3mjvLyD9nyNL-JJOdZZDwkJLshfY7iTKaFqA11lMpTdQs4T). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40f4042871764dfb8560285281547d2c&_e=xjE6DH4ZwVpADW6OTk8do6IFP2zucl_y6WPeGyjgMZrgA-sdxfuEEQrii8szOw91xresmSgKkaCidwaTUKgllThT3NMGVt1RS-oYZPoVs9qYcI_QLJTKVrB4iZLU0VIry3tQdBqrnhrQskui97HfNtRqEZV7Id1ZJ9Mq0G7nsyTiiR1oykYLuUYfcdV8F5Pr7fHEsSNXwn_ZN0L53OdBF1QCEdLWm-oiWfAwNJNUevaoEbOajzXV__aJFYsYzKn0S1g6BJn87KTlF0fv3S03NKTMD9LhkDLq7gH_GIZWibdMpOIlbA-W2eV8Rq1pdpQn)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bb7aa9d74db8456cadef9ca03c1081fd&_e=Mm3_Z_T60Q2XJYWKIY6xus-a4axuKFmkDUWQLxMURMnFFRdmtK_j1MapN9uYGNAtRU2tZn_JddI2DPZiIb1R1TFsaX-SAtINdISE-lqo63JIYaO-8oJsb476frhNjhLkd9DyilwNSJWSFO4Znjj9soWBIlK_326oWz1WAK_wawwwuNHy5BYuy8dDppkv6Li5zoPTbuRJF-X8KZaZCdE0JPYLEGYhAsnp0cOQ3K4WxJtK4adKvVgKnEylwJkuJZ2gliX4jzfYcaR7RqDlrMJJFO73rQL8C8d2uTwWq97dBiWDwrT3ZuG3qykDy4aq-Z03FeRluWh03uIzDWMvJ_Ke0OulKtwg9eVcNT_qY9lC_L86fwnh2vIrdMuWim__KZv4d5xgru0PVlC-rbdhYCoKHU3l0vWy0yXtZ42rHi6me90%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bb7aa9d74db8456cadef9ca03c1081fd&_e=Mm3_Z_T60Q2XJYWKIY6xus-a4axuKFmkDUWQLxMURMnFFRdmtK_j1MapN9uYGNAtRU2tZn_JddI2DPZiIb1R1TFsaX-SAtINdISE-lqo63JIYaO-8oJsb476frhNjhLkd9DyilwNSJWSFO4Znjj9soWBIlK_326oWz1WAK_wawwwuNHy5BYuy8dDppkv6Li5zoPTbuRJF-X8KZaZCdE0JPYLEGYhAsnp0cOQ3K4WxJtK4adKvVgKnEylwJkuJZ2gOIZVVc9B14yI3jqGx0BQCpW76bqp3Bscm2nDTF7rssmAPr3Yz1h4bUoWzS5pmZ8KnVkBCmKYMjBSu1C7ZSQzWvHWefCAnHIgRJSe19O2NxZGG8Je7Bfrb9elri7OHycAe5X2MqXH2HFgaY-2DOpngaQCH5eKM2B-kQtrtRXsOJ0%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bb7aa9d74db8456cadef9ca03c1081fd&_e=Mm3_Z_T60Q2XJYWKIY6xus-a4axuKFmkDUWQLxMURMnFFRdmtK_j1MapN9uYGNAtRU2tZn_JddI2DPZiIb1R1TFsaX-SAtINdISE-lqo63JIYaO-8oJsb476frhNjhLkd9DyilwNSJWSFO4Znjj9soWBIlK_326oWz1WAK_wawwwuNHy5BYuy8dDppkv6Li5zoPTbuRJF-X8KZaZCdE0JPYLEGYhAsnp0cOQ3K4WxJtK4adKvVgKnEylwJkuJZ2gziC9zHrvwFKOOXwILXbg1HRrIdLozgNIrzpRCz-V_ahX5gLxUJU24HBe9_xMjD4o6ww8Q8unMJBGcxwAMbqPxb7rX3L2eUhmUDfxHpHL6W4lTzufnK2rXEVZsqGN2Vv-lEeOw5rU9IimfzPLYaOQpc07aLZ7yYVufeN0RlOBhL4%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Response Requested ----------- House GOP
subject: Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt Trump indictment:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Levin hit the nail on the head.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_"The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad3ebadd394645edb1b53a79f0359f4c&_e=HFp3MqTBem_8agViJzYAnZp0zTNcYfuWq8DXn5GlhA2Sin-PnGAAtHtcnePE9SNyKF_f0iqjnM-_mO49RQaj0eDquPaXISqD6DvIgby4inIknYwArXJWEC3Hi4v-Uvv6vWjGMrGqquHimBwVA4RrP78aBjD9EJ76bX47fuq-LBrJ6GIl7E7FwUpqEv9lMFtx4JfvEsgjgiRe3yO0jcjDeN3YmCOyuLtZFlBWZ3ZxgeAoM9L7f_9mEqT1HMzDyaf98s4R_eCKjrpgWqu6vjgvaV7jhin8EmWOKcu-55V_Pe-P8n-gqi9xB-JV8Ag9RiexXZ-OmQxx917G5DsPkQ99EzGa-JCzzaJEK17uyb962Ns-VqmfTLJzd-C7_lfZ3qdZbGznaHqB8wc-F1_sg6TZTktTBrS10FVKoLd7EJGdRTi1q_eJ7UxjwjXvJ5JQY4HCKPDYry2jMbbCVWUmvUFODQ%3D%3D "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Arrested for standing up to the left
body:
What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders?

| | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. **We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I 'm asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech. **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c4126a066b6410396c3252cf8fd179c&_e=ZwNlOYN3Ik74gtU2cUXEaeZTVTQ1GRp6cQaV2yNonzoH3VQ2vRbx44Hnir0Zyj4vhrjWM3BaVGwa5m21SwLjzZLgmzJ7oD2x7ivSV0DMIYiqxjuXJZRAZmCTeIgODu8LxpQDVArATWkXzELIV1o3PaAkU_kFDJvNMF8iHSfAvz2lIwnn7v0IPq39VyI0tB9ljYcRDSCaLJmt4Mu6TmdHhm3rGS8sxHLGJu23i26t1gCOG3TnMfc0x46EeVbinbPk5GXXlrb5Q0IwZ1FdtcAeQs_fN6SrKopHoPmENXQeMJy6hiiJt9xFsKvjR2v_G3XZ6YMigKHdrwA1ffI9zgsRDvJndQ47YdVYVgZpx46h6y2aTJaF52_vqtaa2ixNmNboHJnFqQ-ltQY-Pn2NGlIpnbavFy9S1Kn19asHkBDZums%3D) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! **That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can't win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c4126a066b6410396c3252cf8fd179c&_e=ZwNlOYN3Ik74gtU2cUXEaeZTVTQ1GRp6cQaV2yNonzoH3VQ2vRbx44Hnir0Zyj4vhrjWM3BaVGwa5m21SwLjzZLgmzJ7oD2x7ivSV0DMIYiqxjuXJZRAZmCTeIgODu8LxpQDVArATWkXzELIV1o3PaAkU_kFDJvNMF8iHSfAvz2lIwnn7v0IPq39VyI0tB9ljYcRDSCaLJmt4Mu6TmdHhm3rGS8sxHLGJu23i26t1gCOG3TnMfc0x46EeVbinbPkILPF8j5WolL06zEKfQPrLk0zprorHYUZmSsHGzzSRZ8bZvLFX6dCOkIkeiNXghqN-NHw0sJXg5W9i7yxZ2bJEDZ1b1MRoVxDv3t6iRKLu4xCuBvbrrirC9_yje36um9J8BtwqB63UzJTmPVMJnB4Crudyw-0Jq6pCPZ_Zyi61l4%3D) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c4126a066b6410396c3252cf8fd179c&_e=ZwNlOYN3Ik74gtU2cUXEaeZTVTQ1GRp6cQaV2yNonzoH3VQ2vRbx44Hnir0Zyj4vhrjWM3BaVGwa5m21SwLjzZLgmzJ7oD2x7ivSV0DMIYiqxjuXJZRAZmCTeIgODu8LxpQDVArATWkXzELIV1o3PaAkU_kFDJvNMF8iHSfAvz2lIwnn7v0IPq39VyI0tB9ljYcRDSCaLJmt4Mu6TmdHhm3rGS8sxHLGJu23i26t1gCOG3TnMfc0x46EeVbinbPk5-QhkewH_qUcdvy3YfnVaPnxucRtSOY-FqMyOMRAECXKJrR8gk3f3DQvMmrfQ7aDg8ldVyzLd4DfYh33jj9V9oFieu7Kz2IOul6Dx4L9ix1f1RQZadATu9BiMpaFHDMSBxFqztiot507zYLo1rVGv3VOxa9HQsLBmRcR2zwClLg%3D) Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---

clean_body: What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? | | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea. One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao. Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress. But we can't win without you. Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead. Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support. Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
