name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Do you have advice for the Class of 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I want to know if you have any advice you’d like to share for this year’s graduating class. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62894134/404895251/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13O_ENG_E_20230506_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWU2YjI4OC0xNmVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6Z2KBwNeKongXK86vEsMU2SLiaDqKaSik_qnHemHEk=&emci=76e6b288-16ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ae6b288-16ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
It’s getting to be graduation season, and I'm very happy that I'll get to help honor some terrific students this year by giving a couple of commencement speeches. As a former teacher and professor, I love commencement traditions. Students, parents, grandparents, siblings, friends, educators and loved ones all come together to celebrate tremendous achievements. And with hearts full of hope, graduates prepare to start their next chapter. It seems like every year we start with the obvious, and it’s true: This year’s class is graduating during a time of tremendous crisis. And with that I usually like to offer some simple advice for their next chapter: _Focus on what you believe in, then fight like hell for it._ [_**But as I prepare to give these speeches, I’m curious: What advice would you give to this year’s graduating class? Please share your thoughts with me here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62894135/404895253/-2107970685?refcode=EMZ13O_ENG_E_20230506_V1S3&ms=EMZ13O_ENG_E_20230506_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWU2YjI4OC0xNmVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6Z2KBwNeKongXK86vEsMU2SLiaDqKaSik_qnHemHEk=&emci=76e6b288-16ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ae6b288-16ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [**SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62894136/404895255/-2107970685?refcode=EMZ13O_ENG_E_20230506_V1S3&ms=EMZ13O_ENG_E_20230506_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWU2YjI4OC0xNmVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6Z2KBwNeKongXK86vEsMU2SLiaDqKaSik_qnHemHEk=&emci=76e6b288-16ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ae6b288-16ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
I believe that every new generation in this country deserves more opportunity than the last — because I know the value of opportunity first-hand.
From the time I was in second grade, I wanted to be a teacher (thanks to Mrs. Lee for telling me I could do it and changing my whole world). But for me to be a teacher, I needed to go to college. Back in Oklahoma, my daddy was a janitor, and my mom worked the phones at Sears. There was no money for college. Besides, my mother already had a plan for her only daughter. In fact, two plans: find a husband; raise some kids.
I, on the other hand, had a different plan. I was a high school debater and I parlayed that into a full scholarship at George Washington University.
But I didn’t follow the textbook on what to do with that opportunity. After two years, I dropped out, got married, and moved to Texas.
Still, I never gave up on my dream of becoming a teacher. And thanks to a public college in Texas that cost $50 a semester (go Cougars!), I got my college degree and got to live my dream of becoming a public school teacher.
My story has a lot more twists and turns: Moving. Babies. Law School. Divorce. Second marriage. But here’s the bottom line: my education opened a zillion doors for me.
That’s why I’m fighting for today’s students to be able to go to school without breaking the bank. I’m deeply grateful for the opportunities I had, and for the chance to help this year’s class of graduates kick off their next chapters. How about we put our heads together on this?
[_**Do you have any advice or messages you’d like to share for this year’s graduating class? Please share your advice with me here — I’d love to know what you think.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62894137/404895256/-2107970685?refcode=EMZ13O_ENG_E_20230506_V1S3&ms=EMZ13O_ENG_E_20230506_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWU2YjI4OC0xNmVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6Z2KBwNeKongXK86vEsMU2SLiaDqKaSik_qnHemHEk=&emci=76e6b288-16ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ae6b288-16ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
[**SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62894138/404895257/-2107970685?refcode=EMZ13O_ENG_E_20230506_V1S3&ms=EMZ13O_ENG_E_20230506_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWU2YjI4OC0xNmVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6Z2KBwNeKongXK86vEsMU2SLiaDqKaSik_qnHemHEk=&emci=76e6b288-16ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ae6b288-16ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

And with that I usually like to offer some simple advice for their next chapter: Focus on what you believe in, then fight like hell for it. | I believe that every new generation in this country deserves more opportunity than the last — because I know the value of opportunity first-hand. From the time I was in second grade, I wanted to be a teacher (thanks to Mrs. Lee for telling me I could do it and changing my whole world). But for me to be a teacher, I needed to go to college. Back in Oklahoma, my daddy was a janitor, and my mom worked the phones at Sears. There was no money for college. Besides, my mother already had a plan for her only daughter. In fact, two plans: find a husband; raise some kids. I, on the other hand, had a different plan. I was a high school debater and I parlayed that into a full scholarship at George Washington University. But I didn’t follow the textbook on what to do with that opportunity. After two years, I dropped out, got married, and moved to Texas. Still, I never gave up on my dream of becoming a teacher. And thanks to a public college in Texas that cost $50 a semester (go Cougars!), I got my college degree and got to live my dream of becoming a public school teacher. My story has a lot more twists and turns: Moving. Babies. Law School. Divorce. Second marriage. But here’s the bottom line: my education opened a zillion doors for me. That’s why I’m fighting for today’s students to be able to go to school without breaking the bank. I’m deeply grateful for the opportunities I had, and for the chance to help this year’s class of graduates kick off their next chapters. How about we put our heads together on this? Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

subject: Newt’s World: Coach Discusses Title IX & DOD Standoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
| | | Peter,

Coach had a great discussion with former speaker of the U.S. House and conservative icon Newt Gingrich a couple weeks back, for episode 548 of the _Newt’s World_ podcast.

**_If you missed it, we’d urge you to give it a listen today._**

Newt and Coach go in-depth on the importance of preserving Title IX – with the Biden administration set to undermine it this month with the release of new rules that would make it illegal to keep biological boys and men out of women’s sports – as well as Coach’s ongoing fight to force the Department of Defense to reverse its new abortion policy.
[**You can listen to the full episode here >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/436c8954a737d52d/1325593c61c572aac3d6b838967d376c/33013)
The episode clocks in at just over 30 minutes. Coach does a great job of breaking down what’s at stake in these important efforts he’s leading the charge on in the U.S. Senate.

[**Take time to check it out today**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/436c8954a737d52d/fc9a2a5419c784eec3d6b838967d376c/33013), and please forward on this email to your family and friends and encourage them to listen too.

\- Team Tuberville

| | Peter, this is Bo Hines. I’m a true conservative Republican and, like you, I’m tired of us being forgotten by the “leaders” of our nation. **Americans all across the country not only deserve a voice - we deserve a voice that’s heard and not forgotten.** [**Don’t you agree?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3acd60e47097433c95238a28ea86e17a&_e=V5W-0_bm-aWAhiK_uZgxVa_RstX-Th0c806qYUNzj4OHgAHUChC-hrXALWUz__9UCsgi5g769G7LdoCI1JM9Aiecjiv_8b4XMSrReRmuKE93nvvPc7DBU3sVTiaMPKGa4k3D8hquDWHQp_3HN15zyz3NGH_bU-xXEuP3hnneEB4FZq09m1rBBj-CUg1faN2s1_lRRoc7nBMPiT4I1hUsrqE8t35Aia2FKX3uVD_-pfOWLDh4stEYHAzme3jphNhg-L2dJr2wAD9dWuAyLAjNwPZ3xULsUQt38MXY-KQIos0lpLcDuJi-tTBUzaJCoSGm-U68pkuXqqhi5rUg0a0o6L8XzR9Of2z5qTWskfoMAETRixNV9-a_FjKwwbh7lqtR_rcTMWChkBl25Ff2YCFiovct_yzXC7kEfOSn94VMVXITFPIbQ135-yXNHwzwUP-1joIJUGd0-aiDQu2o_vqfWA%3D%3D) I’m working to start a movement of conservatives, and a movement for those who feel like we’re being unheard and neglected in Washington, DC. **We need true conservative leaders who are fearless and willing to take on the corrupt liberals and administrations that have been in DC for decades.**
---
[**STAND UP FOR AMERICA!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3acd60e47097433c95238a28ea86e17a&_e=V5W-0_bm-aWAhiK_uZgxVa_RstX-Th0c806qYUNzj4OHgAHUChC-hrXALWUz__9UCsgi5g769G7LdoCI1JM9Aiecjiv_8b4XMSrReRmuKE93nvvPc7DBU3sVTiaMPKGa4k3D8hquDWHQp_3HN15zyz3NGH_bU-xXEuP3hnneEB4FZq09m1rBBj-CUg1faN2s1_lRRoc7nBMPiT4I1hUsrqE8t35Aia2FKX3uVD_-pfOWLDh4stEYHAzme3jphNhg-L2dJr2wAD9dWuAyLAjNwPZ3xULsUQt38MXY-KQIos0lpLcDuJi-tTBUzaJCoSGmrmeFbsp8phENFCb4U-XqHKfIJz3_tW-AWNXAYxSyQCDRysDxlheBL2uVDcSUO_bHMqPcV2omqMhgGnaKuoFguK7Ef_9jNKH59M66sT5_Xj6_i1KeamgcXGmDxH66t_G-7G_qIb2eUpAgo1Uvy2K4TQ%3D%3D)
---
I’m looking for Americans who are unapologetically:
➡️ Pro-America First
➡️ Pro-term limits
➡️ Pro-life
➡️ Pro-school choice
➡️ Pro-gun
➡️ Pro-free speech [**Are you?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3acd60e47097433c95238a28ea86e17a&_e=V5W-0_bm-aWAhiK_uZgxVa_RstX-Th0c806qYUNzj4OHgAHUChC-hrXALWUz__9UCsgi5g769G7LdoCI1JM9Aiecjiv_8b4XMSrReRmuKE93nvvPc7DBU3sVTiaMPKGa4k3D8hquDWHQp_3HN15zyz3NGH_bU-xXEuP3hnneEB4FZq09m1rBBj-CUg1faN2s1_lRRoc7nBMPiT4I1hUsrqE8t35Aia2FKX3uVD_-pfOWLDh4stEYHAzme3jphNhg-L2dJr2wAD9dWuAyLAjNwPZ3xULsUQt38MXY-KQIos0lpLcDuJi-tTBUzaJCoSGmsc_zVdbqjWLgUOYquMzBcCGm1hOrX46rwC6wBG2Lj1v1UKP_IsOsMGD-mDtEcWtfI070-Q78qbZQSfwZIPwbHfOyIsUTpqApK3sHYtKyYHvK6UjxdjfkaeiCdtdTbKmcoIXv_vEuOsjeBcHzfslZog%3D%3D) If so, you’re exactly the kind of patriotic American whose voice deserves to be heard all throughout the halls of Congress. I’ll be in touch soon, Peter. Thank you,

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9483cbad9b264678bd593144e4ec70fa&_e=y9tw6gPDVR2ypGoye_qqh42ZQuyFSb_I3r14WuH1zj9m6Em2afLs4GFzMXSXZxVSrbEWv1GgFVBa0cKpcToKHwPznnJscIsdpN-WnYO2QpbFWcmnB6WnNTC7t5fR_i0t3l4R_MKhY_v1kLaKGzhlGtpJI-ov1wUt8SAUXm9qfVCxfQZvhvrLkMVsfOsa_gFfGVEej00i3LYPEwiaD36oxdFTWsW2KIyaMJFGtMtM4fbivCbiMgqPx9aKsilpzUG2L53YSjqsU4DO8BiX1iPGzuKJzuyRmUPt1tNTxqARRF-QDknFj6GbAF1eRLY0zOixihj15wCz90vQhC91A1a1h-hy6XpXGdy-mCFXvmNCYo0RCK2rnVhHYyVvkJBjjSJww8dlBoRexcmsT9YMhExZwPIAnfHFx2uT0Bihygb3YJw%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9483cbad9b264678bd593144e4ec70fa&_e=y9tw6gPDVR2ypGoye_qqh42ZQuyFSb_I3r14WuH1zj9m6Em2afLs4GFzMXSXZxVSrbEWv1GgFVBa0cKpcToKHwPznnJscIsdpN-WnYO2QpbFWcmnB6WnNTC7t5fR_i0t3l4R_MKhY_v1kLaKGzhlGtpJI-ov1wUt8SAUXm9qfVCxfQZvhvrLkMVsfOsa_gFfGVEej00i3LYPEwiaD36oxdFTWsW2KIyaMJFGtMtM4fbivCbiMgqPx9aKsilpzUG2bgtcpdDvHdOEm-s0fRdQszND7K4Te2epvUjwXPzBJzmeF84j41tlVqH_C1XSsNND_iCyJfoPGZLArEgNiMi40p4KX7yh-_Zf3B_kNTLAIOgjY5zVF7LYsa6m02nSiTkSdBBVxBZ4UEprkfxivE18pD4WPasc6_kgtFn0zidv1a8%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef3fef573bc34f79ae7b13fdfef6f142&_e=u9PmXIAxWp4R6sPKFwbO3VZzmMxLrVzV6gRBerhL8z9LtFnhoPK7L7TfOkEcON_mJyyrVtWZDIZ2kIhHDKOyJ-P-VerLkQN-DnkPfx8RbRww6kTX8VyXguYlylEKNxWy-wv4HETvnJDXWCMKlF3USbk9l1ZqXN-2fLIdU1ugt8qXxnOVte-7pLgoPHIfPFJAy9IukQ58dkLjwDofHTodQw4VmSiB44GKY7gBln6wi37rqxWKmRGDhj038NH1VzRsEEqTSl_i6akRwcJuQ9pVkSzbW6q0c18fg2jYXGZU7cMAKdVczKcwhgfvCS81PZcwZXwl_DUqmx9xLB9Odr6JKJb-Vf6Tmgx2dfYBzrDCmim0diNN9_Shhc58IN5uSsdCbZM59H4fMhLk51J5SLUfz1dLtHL4LSBJLrAaI7W7c6k%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef3fef573bc34f79ae7b13fdfef6f142&_e=u9PmXIAxWp4R6sPKFwbO3VZzmMxLrVzV6gRBerhL8z9LtFnhoPK7L7TfOkEcON_mJyyrVtWZDIZ2kIhHDKOyJ-P-VerLkQN-DnkPfx8RbRww6kTX8VyXguYlylEKNxWy-wv4HETvnJDXWCMKlF3USbk9l1ZqXN-2fLIdU1ugt8qXxnOVte-7pLgoPHIfPFJAy9IukQ58dkLjwDofHTodQw4VmSiB44GKY7gBln6wi37rqxWKmRGDhj038NH1VzRsEEqTSl_i6akRwcJuQ9pVkYfJIsZAnW7fAYPJtPW3JA5MzXggonDK2o1KagVEkdbleo7GrJOnNy31ADEtswduuQkahZwuvUR3of5MPG5Ie3HuJ2ahECh_4qbEGoG7SRfT6bpS42zdpizNdUX7CAfCtm7xMD-ZTnejKdsmdryctck%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef3fef573bc34f79ae7b13fdfef6f142&_e=u9PmXIAxWp4R6sPKFwbO3VZzmMxLrVzV6gRBerhL8z9LtFnhoPK7L7TfOkEcON_mJyyrVtWZDIZ2kIhHDKOyJ-P-VerLkQN-DnkPfx8RbRww6kTX8VyXguYlylEKNxWy-wv4HETvnJDXWCMKlF3USbk9l1ZqXN-2fLIdU1ugt8qXxnOVte-7pLgoPHIfPFJAy9IukQ58dkLjwDofHTodQw4VmSiB44GKY7gBln6wi37rqxWKmRGDhj038NH1VzRsEEqTSl_i6akRwcJuQ9pVkaMVtjsrLzEoVsULDIjoRGd97-pML0O1eVELADH0GPnErXAWF-BXrCEWP_jpzcwoQFkNs5ueSEqCk7LP62EfZnXRH4amQ0nkaCbq4jBwa16a-ALHsh2hmNG18BJ2-6b7tI7zmYwWyE5ujkcjfz5sLzA%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb73f4404-3c28-4d85-9bd7-72e6d81111f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: People vs. Pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1759465?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **YOUR ACTION NEEDED TO FIGHT TOXIC PESTICIDES ** **Here’s the problem, Friend:** Anyone can walk into Home Depot or Lowe’s right now and buy the weedkiller Roundup without realizing its key ingredient, glyphosate, has been linked to **_cancer, hormone disruption, shortened pregnancy, and other severe health impacts._ Children are the most vulnerable! ** **Here’s what you can do:[Tell Home Depot and Lowe’s to STOP selling Roundup and protect its customers and their families from hazardous chemicals!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1759466?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **Here’s why your action matters:** Corporations like Home Depot and Lowe’s value profits above all else. That means they care deeply about public opinion. If enough people like YOU send them a clear message, we can PROTECT people and children from this **TOXIC CHEMICAL! ** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1759467?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Across the country, children are running through playgrounds, rolling on grassy lawns, or picking fruit and vegetables from gardens. However, many are completely unaware that the hazardous chemical glyphosate could be lurking in the vegetation.
**A recent study found that 80% of U.S. children and adults had traces of glyphosate in their bodies.** Pesticide chemicals have no place in our bodies, Friend. This is a clear sign that companies like Home Depot and Lowe’s must IMMEDIATELY remove Roundup from their shelves.
Now is the perfect time to act. **Home Depot and Lowe’s have upcoming shareholder meetings where they’ll vote on key decisions about the future of the company --_so please, Friend, don’t waste another minute!_[FIGHT toxic pesticides and PROTECT consumers by sending a message to Home Depot and Lowe’s by 11:59 pm TONIGHT! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1759468?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1759467?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Paolo Mutia
Food and agriculture campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:
I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c122fc870fea4aa2a61644f74fed0b81&_e=SzH6EWNIddJ0_InHznxu2Bk6vD2vQ2wxuRSS7INiCIMrn1MmSQilumGYtGKHl-wBz9HVU3DEUKJAGBD2pC6bqrrGJBsZlrKy-TEukcqpkHQdc8nxFV_PJ5vtWhSe12QiQZmB6mYq2DtF_1A_i5_HpQbMU7ewt3YClOeHrVUmUMqCalotuIEvKyMF18M58nX5bCC8hK2QXW8wQpJHRmJOX4MYhfKUuAQs36Jrk8l8-X8oeSGGyvqZ0FxIesfZyBBbJ2KiSnlai5uhvadTucpYhQFl1ClCekDMSwnpYYjM0btVDCKIZSfIqfVo70HnWoH8CeDP8sBHqHxWhEMyGRR5IsdFVAM2QC1iELXfvmiVEpLbL-x6tKYqYZhr66X1DWI49si9pexvxmWZX405wb6QocrMCKe09sTu9HcoxxxtQPyVWBwwpx90b6gl3yejbTDm)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c122fc870fea4aa2a61644f74fed0b81&_e=SzH6EWNIddJ0_InHznxu2Bk6vD2vQ2wxuRSS7INiCIMrn1MmSQilumGYtGKHl-wBz9HVU3DEUKJAGBD2pC6bqrrGJBsZlrKy-TEukcqpkHQdc8nxFV_PJ5vtWhSe12QiQZmB6mYq2DtF_1A_i5_HpQbMU7ewt3YClOeHrVUmUMqCalotuIEvKyMF18M58nX5bCC8hK2QXW8wQpJHRmJOX4MYhfKUuAQs36Jrk8l8-X8oeSGGyvqZ0FxIesfZyBBb3cINBYrxYGJ2AQuX__q3gnXJTKsT2EyTAKIH5mfYbS8CK7hUqsOymeVsBwIADf1dzwRCgv0T2Ca07564UrRVAzFsVZIRfTiSn_H7jaYMFaiq0csWgdXCq1HO1Ggkc_x2leejPn98eB0bSmJqOL9F7ywsHPF5dim2JkQtwWIBIPE%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I spoke up. Then this happened.

body:
I've been threatened, slandered, and physically assaulted because I dared to speak up for my fellow female athletes.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9d6f00e9a63410e88168236c2e07d38&_e=Ta_0XAiqbOiY42UwxMKr-yp6gKTxmDgWxNrO1adQhpwYimFlYieRVk76cNdAAcr5ZrFJAhWclPT4YPa2uPRoEtKi4OhF42JwKp82u5WwnRsLxLZVZI0fLqARunmZCclyrKzIQxTvkmSLoKufRviLwKsKPPL-gcw4C-6KzB13OFOu4LBiXxqoJj067qsAKIUR_Fcj5A84XY8-DgnDe3smUycXfoqiELuu__yXRUYR8Yy3SIvg3wAXQTGrSVL-P0qtj0zlrzpbVr5-eTyBSbv-O2t2eQj24Cl9S1twoQGXavwFkCaJxZ4v4Tnxfy_Sx3bRwhDr97W_9uq-YJES38JI5qHup1f7Bbu6Vq_EUTWnFIOAKCTQAmF99Y8CTQtt8ZbX)
---
| | Hi there friend, I'm Riley Gaines. If you aren't familiar with my story, I've been _threatened_ , _slandered,_ and _physically assaulted_ because I dared to speak up for my fellow female athletes. You see, I'm a **12-time All-American swimmer** and **former NCAA athlete with 5 SEC titles**. Being the daughter of two college athletes, it was instilled in me at an early age that dedication and hard work are needed to compete at the highest level of athletics. My whole world revolved around living, breathing, and working to improve my abilities as a swimmer and athlete. **But that world was turned upside down in 2022. ** **At the 2022 NCAA Women 's Swimming Championships, I was forced to use the same locker room as and compete against Lia Thomas, a biological male. **
---
[**PROTECT WOMEN'S SPORTS >>> **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9d6f00e9a63410e88168236c2e07d38&_e=Ta_0XAiqbOiY42UwxMKr-yp6gKTxmDgWxNrO1adQhpwYimFlYieRVk76cNdAAcr5ZrFJAhWclPT4YPa2uPRoEtKi4OhF42JwKp82u5WwnRsLxLZVZI0fLqARunmZCclyrKzIQxTvkmSLoKufRviLwKsKPPL-gcw4C-6KzB13OFOu4LBiXxqoJj067qsAKIUR_Fcj5A84XY8-DgnDe3smU0M9wjZVNh3Du-OstEto3wN0otjSUeNhJ7ugrjaXLH_bC35jBLmr4tJBVvJZZmKYCKXkEe5e4xFkxBG-gxqSKJGHqnBwRsh0nBNuWwlkxiDz15YeJAeGQB28NipN_Fk23FRcU0wWdrTF2kl8GEbMvQnOBd39-twOM7_HUy7OdRfw)
---
Despite Thomas and I tying in the 200m freestyle race, NCAA officials handed Thomas the trophy, **denying me that moment of achievement I had worked my entire life towards. ** I remember wondering why no one stood up for any of us women in the room. **That 's when my life changed, and I knew what I needed to do.** **I spoke up for every woman at that pool who felt what I felt but feared the consequences.** And I now work with an organization dedicated to fighting for female athletes-** sign up to learn more about my fight here >> ****[https://www.iwv.org/campaign/protect-womens-sports/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9d6f00e9a63410e88168236c2e07d38&_e=Ta_0XAiqbOiY42UwxMKr-4R4J2Gz1awJnUkYwDfc_DMAhfrxRiH_fm1W3F2ZRGyQFj9fc4Rk-HGU37D7mIBU1nqcEg41eKJfufYYmpvEYuF-N1ZkkbbwuNpac5zPCkOtYwKgUVobXv2A-0_88p5vzRUSxfRqGgahNDf17fx9qqZ3S8qt-1qoBYamk0HCa8znOvgHoB8VFMyvTNli_l2nzS1bmB3n8PTYYuT0x5C8FLhykrcf6WvtMl4TVwd0_5XQbOEJqYnaCVMAaaWNjCMaBIJye5_nYaLxm6Fzw6hneTfPGGsc_Mg86R4bClGGoC2YBGTUOmk_hLmJ44oaHYIW6J71xv3UaIbDorkpwGRFazdbbX_68sSRG8HUnFK7W8Qu)** **And after I spoke up, I quickly realized I wasn 't alone. ** Leaders like Congresswoman Claudia Tenney and others are standing up with me to ensure no other female athletes have to experience what we did that day.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9d6f00e9a63410e88168236c2e07d38&_e=Ta_0XAiqbOiY42UwxMKr-yp6gKTxmDgWxNrO1adQhpwYimFlYieRVk76cNdAAcr5ZrFJAhWclPT4YPa2uPRoEtKi4OhF42JwKp82u5WwnRsLxLZVZI0fLqARunmZCclyrKzIQxTvkmSLoKufRviLwKsKPPL-gcw4C-6KzB13OFOu4LBiXxqoJj067qsAKIUR_Fcj5A84XY8-DgnDe3smU2x4Ca86QBkuUG0qfBJIlnpxPEUGcgw2AMzU_ujh1jznu0_XzzNC7LKPF1_KEk2oQQ_FPm6BvuQKeEa1Kf68DYnh3XKRGlU-duAi8W782kmcUj6IvO2GqgkeoaxjRALZ3YiHMwcWEhi97Kyft4oP5gZ9s5irsN9n-gNMXJT3tvI4)
---
[**PROTECT WOMEN'S SPORTS >>> **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9d6f00e9a63410e88168236c2e07d38&_e=Ta_0XAiqbOiY42UwxMKr-yp6gKTxmDgWxNrO1adQhpwYimFlYieRVk76cNdAAcr5ZrFJAhWclPT4YPa2uPRoEtKi4OhF42JwKp82u5WwnRsLxLZVZI0fLqARunmZCclyrKzIQxTvkmSLoKufRviLwKsKPPL-gcw4C-6KzB13OFOu4LBiXxqoJj067qsAKIUR_Fcj5A84XY8-DgnDe3smU6nCLigwnRwQ-_i-0Pqh852agFBN9iBngpwY0kKN55_g5p4QtdQHwt_WIbmJK65VhFO_dZUhn-jo-NKCQkyMiVCdOBX14U8xNWdLOldMneuFExFWyorW2jmC9gd7jRggubZu-XmjD1JRXGfl7LeVLf-SA6OqxYY1He32F6dBaGe8)

Congresswoman Tenney recently played a pivotal role in helping pass legislation to protect women's sports. **We are determined to see this fight through to the end, but we need your help.** [**By adding your name today, you will support the fight to protect the integrity of women's sports and ensure that future female athletes like me never have to experience what I did. >>>**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9d6f00e9a63410e88168236c2e07d38&_e=Ta_0XAiqbOiY42UwxMKr-yp6gKTxmDgWxNrO1adQhpwYimFlYieRVk76cNdAAcr5ZrFJAhWclPT4YPa2uPRoEtKi4OhF42JwKp82u5WwnRsLxLZVZI0fLqARunmZCclyrKzIQxTvkmSLoKufRviLwKsKPPL-gcw4C-6KzB13OFOu4LBiXxqoJj067qsAKIUR_Fcj5A84XY8-DgnDe3smU1DlGcBw96BdB8lzvOI4aPzVbl4JRmce7LYI0iD5hi9Fix60A3GTQ1HNKoKj_1vL-ucczPxPdox6R0bzYVKyQoxDPkcie-QhKOfTTtAt3CP85hpwV4_Pw8yg0x9U_PBmp6bBsKD_X8e_rMwU9sbQ8h3bgCD0tLlGqzuJ-3q5GM35)

clean_body: I've been threatened, slandered, and physically assaulted because I dared to speak up for my fellow female athletes. | | | | | Hi there friend, I'm Riley Gaines. If you aren't familiar with my story, I've been threatened , slandered, and physically assaulted because I dared to speak up for my fellow female athletes. You see, I'm a 12-time All-American swimmer and former NCAA athlete with 5 SEC titles. Being the daughter of two college athletes, it was instilled in me at an early age that dedication and hard work are needed to compete at the highest level of athletics. My whole world revolved around living, breathing, and working to improve my abilities as a swimmer and athlete. But that world was turned upside down in 2022. At the 2022 NCAA Women 's Swimming Championships, I was forced to use the same locker room as and compete against Lia Thomas, a biological male. Despite Thomas and I tying in the 200m freestyle race, NCAA officials handed Thomas the trophy, denying me that moment of achievement I had worked my entire life towards. I remember wondering why no one stood up for any of us women in the room. That 's when my life changed, and I knew what I needed to do. I spoke up for every woman at that pool who felt what I felt but feared the consequences. And I now work with an organization dedicated to fighting for female athletes- sign up to learn more about my fight here >> And after I spoke up, I quickly realized I wasn 't alone. Leaders like Congresswoman Claudia Tenney and others are standing up with me to ensure no other female athletes have to experience what we did that day. Congresswoman Tenney recently played a pivotal role in helping pass legislation to protect women's sports. We are determined to see this fight through to the end, but we need your help. | | Thank you, Riley Gaines P.S. If you 'd like to support and follow my fight directly for women's sports, please sign up here: | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | | | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Read/Act News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.-jPct3-A) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://trk.readactnews.-QyjM3K9BGLDXHXsTg3Nqw) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://trk.readactnews.-5A) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention-and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMjYtNjczYmZiYzE3MjRhNDA1NGEyZGViNzZkY2JkMjNkOGMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/qXxmfEBmFdWAhRrzIa52VA) to unsubscribe.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Cut crime if we want to grow Mississippi – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133032?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**A radical attempt to reform criminal justice is underway across America. **

Anti police politicians want to defund the police. Soros-backed public prosecutors often appear unwilling to prosecute serial wrong-doers. Anti prison progressives seem to regard prision as a problem, rather than as the solution.

**Tragically the anti police, anti prison, anti prosecution agenda has a price – and it is a price paid disproportionately by African American communities across the country.**

On Thursday, Rafael Mangual came to talk at an event hosted by the Mississippi Center for Public Policy about the consequences of misguided criminal justice reform.

You can watch what Rafael had to say here.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f78b30ae6c&e=5703353baa)
---
| **Here in Mississippi our state capital, Jackson, has one of the highest per capita homicide rates in the nation.** Last year, our murder rate was close to twice that of Atlanta – and as we know from media coverage, the victims are overwhelmingly African American.
Rafael Mangual shared with us research that shows that when the police, public prosecutors and the courts do decide to get tough on violent offenders, crime rates fall – and the beneficiaries are overwhelmingly African American.
**Over the past few years in America, many well-meaning folk have wanted to believe that there are better alternatives to prison.** If only we did not lock up so many people, so the story goes, wrong doers might return to being useful members of society. Maybe if we did not incarcerate so many people we could rehabilitate them back in to the community?

Rafael has produced powerful evidence to prove that this is wishful thinking.

The primary purpose of prison is not to rehabilitate offenders – although that should not mean that we should to seek to. Nor are criminals sent to prison primarily to deter others from such behavior. **The primary purpose of prison is to lock up bad people to prevent them doing bad things to good people.**

The evidence shows overwhelmingly that when we fail to keep persistent offenders in prison, we often free them to commit more crimes.

There is nothing inevitable about our appallingly high crime rate. We need action that has proven effective elsewhere to cut crime here.

Nor is our high rate of crime consigned to Hinds county. We need to be prepared to act for the sake of our entire state.

If our state is to prosper, we need to address crime and public safety as a top priority – and we need leaders that recognise that crime is a Mississippi wide problem.

**Rafael’s talk in front of a packed audience in Jackson was a wake-up call for our leaders. **

The Mississippi Center for Public Policy will be in the forefront of this fight to get serious about violent crime – and we are convinced that with the right policy changes it is a fight our state can win.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=db00652b72&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| | |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

body:
| | | Peter, When Joe Biden and Kamala Harris took their oaths of office, they promised to protect and defend our great nation.

_But right now, they’re doing NOTHING to keep Americans safe from one of the biggest dangers our country is facing..._

**...ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION.**

Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the rest of the Democrats are letting drugs, weapons, and criminals _pour_ into our country through the Southern border.

They won’t take a stand to keep our country safe - **but I know patriots like YOU will.**

**We need every patriot to take a stand to BUILD THE WALL now before our border is gone for good.**

Did you get Emily’s message from yesterday? It’s important, and Emily wanted to make sure you saw this. | | | Peter,Did you get Emily’s message from yesterday? It’s important, and Emily wanted to make sure you saw this.For Emily, running for Congress is personal. Read her heartfelt message below, and **[be sure to chip in and ensure MI-10 gets a true leader who will keep our community safe.](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=47f111e3b96f4cadbd5afc311c1117bf&_e=fpvlmv0EnhyssWGvVNZ1yHVncnI0ROVHwlG2NA-1Epvyy3iYxhsHG8pxSMswvNb1QqT9EZd-E-n5caqD81gxJ_mZp30-wsJoqUUa0-kgmRcqmLPXQF7f3wPdZUK-2J850h54xTAFyMeTeH87vTHr_DJJYaX5YxwGxTtFI-7KJlBK7oIdWsnEiO-WcEx9y1hloSn7Tx4Z3rola2wG-sc-6P6W2oFeRqf0akSeG1ug42XN3yQt34eTTAF15VCudkB0pPOIr8z5xsEbwtYckGG3VcKeZ6s6u60jHTaYWeGAv-UEhU0d4jsC2_df9cUktMcBv5lYH6oLiQ2NC1Kvedo8jNwOj_unGZPq4NogLHj4FJpTq5c9ll2rDjQsl8bjFZIfxIUvLc3RpFAzJEFNoE1JuyqOwa96sfP1AJqmpQIWKU0%3D)** – Busch for Congress\------ Original Message ------ [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=47f111e3b96f4cadbd5afc311c1117bf&_e=fpvlmv0EnhyssWGvVNZ1yHVncnI0ROVHwlG2NA-1Epvyy3iYxhsHG8pxSMswvNb1QqT9EZd-E-n5caqD81gxJ_mZp30-wsJoqUUa0-kgmRcqmLPXQF7f3wPdZUK-2J850h54xTAFyMeTeH87vTHr_DJJYaX5YxwGxTtFI-7KJlBK7oIdWsnEiO-WcEx9y1hloSn7Tx4Z3rola2wG-sc-6P6W2oFeRqf0akSeG1ug42XN3yQt34eTTAF15VCudkB0pPOIr8z5xsEbwtYckGG3Vd_lN-Gcyk1NW-ShpWvGJ_aTYFxhr1YjZR6EcMlEpQ9Zsv3eoyFqArP4aeMNwX6lSh59iW5Dc4YSY1A4hI53p5qU_mT7NIv7NJW5jmZbY7yuyXOeDBoMnA1_6juK-U43gLMbb7CIXdZtiq-q7sbsxEg%3D) Hey Peter – I wanted to personally reach out amidst the hustle and bustle of launching this campaign.**[But before we catch up, can you chip in $30 to help us start May off strong?](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=47f111e3b96f4cadbd5afc311c1117bf&_e=fpvlmv0EnhyssWGvVNZ1yHVncnI0ROVHwlG2NA-1Epvyy3iYxhsHG8pxSMswvNb1QqT9EZd-E-n5caqD81gxJ_mZp30-wsJoqUUa0-kgmRcqmLPXQF7f3wPdZUK-2J850h54xTAFyMeTeH87vTHr_DJJYaX5YxwGxTtFI-7KJlBK7oIdWsnEiO-WcEx9y1hloSn7Tx4Z3rola2wG-sc-6P6W2oFeRqf0akSeG1ug42XN3yQt34eTTAF15VCudkB0619SgnK1dcvqJhlFkscSS5zX4objAA_JYrr77gStbK11kf_O4gZGKnGEwQMX83mQuvjtjdEReBQjC4VBxI8yrzWECppw5CnC1Wo_FYmJS9bboIHNrnbCcoC0UYzGasVH4W81cL5B8N_d4RD6A-GZjN6mu1Xwr7gJnfN7Uer8O8cMH2ana8QtyLue0n19GLpU)** You may know that in the aftermath of the Oxford High School shooting, I started attending the school district’s Board of Education meetings. The questions asked at that meeting had nothing to do with the shooting, **but rather about mask enforcement.** At that point, I knew our community needed real leaders who focused on the pressing issues at hand.I began to organize with parents, teachers, students, and families, and we successfully advocated for common-sense gun safety legislation at the state level. But I knew we were still lacking – there was still so much left to accomplish.That is why I launched my campaign for Congress. John James is pocketing thousands of dollars from the NRA, even with shootings continuing to happen across our state and our nation. More has to be done, and I know for a fact that I can accomplish so much for our families in Congress.**[If you’re ready for new leadership that can stand up to the gun lobby and enact real, lifesaving legislation, chip in today to help me defeat John James.](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=47f111e3b96f4cadbd5afc311c1117bf&_e=fpvlmv0EnhyssWGvVNZ1yHVncnI0ROVHwlG2NA-1Epvyy3iYxhsHG8pxSMswvNb1QqT9EZd-E-n5caqD81gxJ_mZp30-wsJoqUUa0-kgmRcqmLPXQF7f3wPdZUK-2J850h54xTAFyMeTeH87vTHr_DJJYaX5YxwGxTtFI-7KJlBK7oIdWsnEiO-WcEx9y1hloSn7Tx4Z3rola2wG-sc-6P6W2oFeRqf0akSeG1ug42XN3yQt34eTTAF15VCudkB0pPOIr8z5xsEbwtYckGG3VTKWPXNa8JTTrXdNVdVk4kolGJq2qq8uFyaac4-dX-CR05rHXIzSYBMzaZ66L5Yyn_b0YKMD6aPLsuKcX9vVG8HuI4qkJgFZ4ah5DMssF2WMAYpagFPdUedTMuU0ljb-uD-IDI_AF_9ItDicCQRZozA%3D)** With your help, we can work together to prevent future tragedies and create a safer future for our children.All the best,
Emily PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

name: Ashley
subject: Fitzpatrick voted to cut veterans’ healthcare, and I’m pissed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress
body:
I wanted to reach out personally on something. | Hello, I asked my team to help me reach out personally. Brian Fitzpatrick just voted to slash the VA’s budget by 22 percent, and as an actual combat veteran who relies on the VA for healthcare, I’m pissed. I'm pissed because I have friends who will never be able to work again because of the injuries they sustained fighting for our country. They gave everything of themselves just to watch Republicans blow up the healthcare that they paid for with their bodies. Brian Fitzpatrick and his GOP cronies — most of whom have never lifted a finger for this country much less bled for it — happily slashing the healthcare of our country's heroes to score stupid political points makes me sick. Stopping this kind of shit is EXACTLY why I am running for Congress. I know you’re just as pissed as I am, so I hope you’ll consider giving to my campaign so that we kick these guys out of office once and for all. You can make a donation here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eha-email-may2023?personal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62888170/404885923/-945033547?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230505vacuts_ae_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmM1OWE0MC0xM2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-fCkkkOPyZVklWbFL_2mv5uLxAKWRokxo_eyCwiOuls=) Thanks for reading and Brian Fitzpatrick sucks, Ashley Sent from my iPhone

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: BREAKING: We’re taking ACTION to REDUCE America’s deficit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
It’s time for Biden to come to the table and negotiate for the American people
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=399ada2a5b4045e38929e17b847715f2&_e=eTsLUEMiTKHYNXZ8eTDW9oP1kAK7_lpSfrhFFX0eD0DsJzIkOStKODoCgRzD94Ptp_GDkXDkF74snXlKATAzCnnvAopJ4msZ41-LnM_uZWgWJsbK_Ot-7kerEY8vwzSTyvctbh2zp32GF-M_UaX4HpSYdGMdp79zSHSAm0gdxtSZ06XK2Gwjdujb6nmPioDX1B503Kv8H44efdv9N0i-vnW66bPx_wnUcOm8FYLwPEAfY13WrrLfQHEOZxqPD2IsHoFx-QlHKHiH4WxDqKJ0ATNrOp1nNLYLErjFr9E7o3ldL-OIEIRSB-iM2sIe2-Udg4sizAgFzdDKILvKDxoOnYFd8e-Cl9zRFSKNfJXXhTo%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Last week, I took action to _REDUCE our country’s deficit_ while Joe Biden’s **RECKLESS** and **FAR-LEFT** policies continue adding to it.
---
**'Playing with American lives': House GOP leaders blast Biden before debt limit vote**
---
}
_Source: USA Today_
---
_And the President won’t even come to the table and negotiate for the betterment of the American people –**what kind of “leader” does that?** _
---
Luckily, conservatives like me who _**actually**_ want to solve America’s problems are in control of the People’s House – meaning we’re going to act _with_ or _without_ Biden’s support.
---
_**Our key objectives from the action we took last week on America’s deficit are to:**_
---
* **REDUCE** America's debt by **$4.8 TRILLION** over the next ten years.
* **ELIMINATE** Biden's _ridiculous_ student loan forgiveness plan.
* **CUT** _wasteful_ and _unnecessary_ government spending across the board.
* **REVIVE** our struggling economy and get it _back to its pre-Biden state._
* **BOOST** domestic energy production in the United States.

---
**Peter, this is the first of many steps to reducing the national debt and securing a brighter future for the next generation of Americans.**
---
[**So, will you please sign my PETITION to show your support for the action that I took last week to reduce America’s debt and get our country back on the right track?**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=399ada2a5b4045e38929e17b847715f2&_e=eTsLUEMiTKHYNXZ8eTDW9oP1kAK7_lpSfrhFFX0eD0DsJzIkOStKODoCgRzD94Ptp_GDkXDkF74snXlKATAzCnnvAopJ4msZ41-LnM_uZWgWJsbK_Ot-7kerEY8vwzSTyvctbh2zp32GF-M_UaX4HpSYdGMdp79zSHSAm0gdxtSZ06XK2Gwjdujb6nmPioDX1B503Kv8H44efdv9N0i-vgosq007iHANPwO518r45mYDZY34LP2ewQYGh3deSFQqT4Jz3GzhgddUfTFYJ08KkqDJk1qzYwANzzHI7iz0poDIwdRGZev1sDhEDuKWg1WgkS_wAsFUGtt5mTnsKJRzI5cTE7Mya8nKBXV7Q6hlSlI%3D)
---

Peter, this is the first of many steps to reducing the national debt and securing a brighter future for the next generation of Americans.** Thank you, Scott Fitzgerald Congressman (WI-05) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress PO Box 484 Oconomowoc, WI 53066

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: If $6,000 a month in private school tuition to a Supreme Court justice’s relative isn’t a bribe, what is it?
body:
What do you think?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba99659e-6c7b-4d35-8a74-f7fe0abcae3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, My God, they've done it again! Remember Harlan Crow? The billionaire who collects Hitler paintings, took Clarence Thomas on a $500,000 vacation to Asia, luxurious trips on his super-yacht and bought Thomas' mother's house for her to live mortgage-free--all while having business before The Court?? **[Well, it gets worse. Thomas has a grand-nephew he raised as his son, and guess who ProPublica discovered paid the boy's private school tuition?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta22c1a1a-4d10-46de-90f9-f7c84ca41bca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7bf33711-6834-498d-ac5c-faa088bcae8e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Let's take a tour of the last couple weeks, shall we? News broke a $1.6 Billion "gift" (see "slush fund") was used to install/corrupt right-wing Supreme Court Justices by a cabal known as The Federalist Society. We learned Justice Gorsuch sold land to a partner at a corporate firm with cases before him and didn't report the buyer's name. We found out Brett Kavanaugh skated on scores of sexual harassment and assault tips--there was no Senate or FBI investigation to speak of. [**These greed-infested zealots can't continue to wield the power to control women's bodies or give 25-yr olds assault rifles. The ONLY recourse is to expand The Court. Will you join the fight to retake The Court by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Demand Justice?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bac4e88-6769-4c59-a86f-890b4d53e609/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Future generations will thank us for still living in a democracy because of what we do right now. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. News broke a $1.6 Billion "gift" (see "slush fund") was used to install/corrupt right-wing Supreme Court Justices by a cabal known as The Federalist Society. We learned Justice Gorsuch sold land to a partner at a corporate firm with cases before him and didn't report the buyer's name. We found out Brett Kavanaugh skated on scores of sexual harassment and assault tips--there was no Senate or FBI investigation to speak of. Future generations will thank us for still living in a democracy because of what we do right now. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Biden HQ
subject: [Get Involved] We want to hear from you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We want to make it easy for you to get involved with the campaign. | | |
---
Peter, As we build out this campaign, we want to make it easy for you to get involved from the very beginning -- whether you’ve volunteered for many campaigns or this is your first rodeo. **So tell us:** ** I want to help Joe and Kamala finish the job we started by... **
* **[Sharing content on social media:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/KTqGVTU95m3XYkCVwdzD9fM6TqEIfA1z-ocymu2qH2jFHl2P3_WVR6VbnQWSXxQViKDxH6pCrmd3bfL4UQluULk7OYlgbH0vJU3KulurkSGQVVtHwwT0ngz79hxtGulTxFrbwZxkMdpfmeHnhNaZnaximNsAw0VmY4gr8Vesn6K-pJjjbVk_4OQ4tjhj3knLBk4rIZW15G3GEEElT0W3_Mlw2v8iHYm_AGx3nMdV284nY-mSJ51f_Nx6JXsijPNNCv_qW9y4cgnbQRj04PfhYyJos6_vsF4P0AcY5IB_rqbwyiVDB7sy09nHT7XagF8bO-Qcd56xjwHQtMBnLi-Qlj4zFbgYFd-ZI7pmSyIQQjjmdEQpmy7NugcdYM7GXLf0c9nmuqE1fLaspJ9sA7j-ng/3vy/mfj8QjDcSQirIkXtlYcT7A/h0/s5SrhqGLhAC0kMgxEEKhJJhgXumDB1oxyUEBA5du1K0)** Our organizing program is going to be powered by people like you talking to your friends, family, and communities. _You_ are our best validator -- and sharing on your social media pages is a great way to get started!
* **[Volunteering my time:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn2H0La_yXIpyATgV_97-8c2SwwEm8gV6LLY4cXzGAQv6BCcKbkhDdPWH5CodahU26nqwcWy_VpFM0ixMFlWBXaoFbRVBNONU15ku-Oh1NZ5_NXRdo9LFw7NnGUd8ypuZ30m5aZ6buGT0IjqE3EXKBsph2VqRrsBpK19vQJDwdK8OlvtFnDEVSfXYcGc8vbuUwSNfj_JqIHwQgcLPRsp_1tAlyO77s1KIUNpv5hUDlVaqjwbyt5ZaTcgB10CQFFFuAmlIjPjVZOU1_qcl308w9zJXhhu0F3fYM5gdMyckEOqsUHwsgb2I1G24lJz3yol1QpwAOjB0ipGuYOk8_BJ_SxYoqqlYcWlz2PAJWWstDJMqM6sh7RYkkSPV138q8diYY/3vy/mfj8QjDcSQirIkXtlYcT7A/h1/WsdggReQZ0gVyUCxPkczXSioDMX5rJodb9frYhhAZn4) **Building a powerful grassroots network of volunteers will make all the difference in this race. Whether it’s making phone calls, knocking on doors, or hosting an event, volunteering helps connect you with your neighbors to ensure they’re ready to vote for Joe and Kamala.
* **[Making a donation:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZpti-0hYGO1wbpprT27EYQh68Gizy0OgMVBKM-UIfBSzLFRRjABt0pCC2wakcHcaKyCACIb5r5dn4uboFu9OpWfukEdWxsmFRIzNkjAKr3fMDo4aRYbtNRWTR6XST41o3v4VKcMx0tZ6fg8g-QdFAsWNRojciGQ1wSx0AZWfva6LgqJJ0Pu2t_CjEbNID1UOBvVqIy9j3KFJ5Y_oZ_D8nk6aEsd-KtLrZ22z_yswypKOxGh-P0S6K1T2CTzrzc_1h7gBpCQwPVqfUAAsUFJMi2ryX9mR8fuPCltpdBsTC0UZWALxmk21XFypUE5jap_mF53En24nhiLa1foCIpYIS7HL--Cuo96g1b746IXOIWHA9c2xya-T3d97ystZWvaUv-dZfpskIwCPiruc_fJVFyg/3vy/mfj8QjDcSQirIkXtlYcT7A/h2/TQpQoDYTtmfkjiyTCpYR8valPYa8okTMJJM8P-Q0mtg)** Six million grassroots donors helped lead Joe and Kamala to victory in 2020. Now, they’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to pitch in to deliver four more years for Democrats in the White House.

No matter how you choose to get involved, we’re so grateful to have you on this team. \-- Biden HQ

name: SB
subject: I'll keep this short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
---
Sorry to email you again, friend – but your input is so important that I had to reach out one more time before we finalize our priorities for May.
**Will you take just one minute to share your input in our digital focus group? Friend, if there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this:
**I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do.** For me, this means going to bat for working families in Ohio and across the country. It means making sure _your_ __ voice is heard in the halls of Congress and on the Senate floor.
I’m proud of the progress we’ve made over the last couple of years, including passing a historic infrastructure bill and standing up for workers’ rights. **But we’ve still got a long way to go, so as we chart out our next steps, I’m asking top supporters like you to weigh in.**
I’ve always said the best ideas don’t come from Washington – they come from the people we serve. In an ideal world, I’d get to sit down and chat with each and every member of this grassroots team to find out which issues are keeping you up at night, what makes you hopeful about our future, and what you want to see Democrats accomplish next. But since that just isn't possible, inviting you to join my new digital focus group is the next best thing.
[**Please, friend, will you take just a moment to share your thoughts with me? name: The team at VoteVets
subject: Five Reasons Why
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Derek -
Republicans across the country are running scared after their shameful vote to cut Veterans benefits by 22%.
[**We’re taking the fight to them, and we need you to chip in $5 to keep it going.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may23.LTpcsd&refcode=em230506-1-15&t=1&akid=8415%2E3013755%2Em1wKy0)** Here are five reasons why you should make that donation. Check it out:
1. We had a press conference with Speaker Emerita Pelosi, our congressional allies, and Veterans on the Hill calling the GOP out for this vote.

2. The White House released a video from that event, using our Veterans and their stories.

3. We got GOP Rep. Kiggans from Virginia to ADMIT in an interview that they’re using Veterans as pawns in the debt ceiling fight.

4. We launched an ad in Lauren Boebert’s district, targeting Veterans, Military Families, and persuadable voters — making sure they know that Boebert voted to gut care for Veterans.

5. And Lauren Boebert RESPONDED, pushing out more lies about how much she loves our Veterans, all after voting to cut billions of dollars from the VA.

VoteVets is the tip of the spear right now, and those are five great reasons to make a donation right away.
[**So please: If you like what you see and want to help us keep it up, make a $5 donation today. We'll put it right back into this critical work.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may23.LTpcsd&refcode=em230506-1-15&t=2&akid=8415%2E3013755%2Em1wKy0)**

name: Team Pramila
subject: Let’s break this down:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila is determined to place the burden of fighting inflation where it belongs — with the greedy corporations fueling it.
#
Peter, let’s talk about what’s wrong with the GOP’s economic "strategy."
Working people are being left behind by an economy that favors the ultra-wealthy. Our basic human needs are consistently compromised for political favors.
From inflation and price-gouging to wage stagnation and failing labor infrastructures — our current systems are not meeting the urgency of our needs.
**While this is an uphill battle, Pramila is entirely committed to fighting for working class people in Congress and working to dismantle this unjust system once and for all.[If you stand with Pramila, please chip in $3 today to continue growing our movement to fight for a just and functioning economy.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41876?refcode=em20230506-2452&t=1&akid=2452%2E420207%2E2CqRnt)**
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41876?refcode=em20230506-2452&t=20&akid=2452%2E420207%2E2CqRnt)**
The GOP’s current economic strategy is littered with pandering to their billionaire donors and a lack of compassion for the working-class people. **Take a look:**
[****](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41876?refcode=em20230506-2452&t=21&akid=2452%2E420207%2E2CqRnt)
Right away we can see what’s wrong with this plan of action — but let’s break it down a bit further, together. **Defaulting on our debt would mean:**
❌ **Seven million** people would lose their jobs
❌ The unemployment rate would surge to**8%**
**❌ $10 trillion in household wealth would be wiped out **
**And so much more.**
We cannot let far-right House Republicans get away with holding our economy hostage. That’s why Pramila is determined to place the burden of fighting inflation where it belongs — with the greedy corporations fueling it.
**Peter, holding these bad actors accountable will take pressure and power from every corner of the country, and our grassroots movement is leading this fight.**
[**Chip in today to continue supporting Pramila and progressive leaders like her in Congress as they work to bring true economic justice to our communities.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41876?refcode=em20230506-2452&t=22&akid=2452%2E420207%2E2CqRnt)
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230506-2452-footer&t=23&refcode2=2452_420207_2CqRnt&akid=2452%2E420207%2E2CqRnt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2452%2E420207%2E2CqRnt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2452%2E420207%2E2CqRnt)

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here Peter, This week, Nikki launched an offensive against the newly announced Biden campaign, raising questions on Joe Biden’s mental competence and Kamala Harris’ actual competence. Nikki also held yet another standing-room-only rally, this time in Greer, SC. The crowd was fired up! Hundreds of people showed up to meet Nikki and hear more about her mission to save America! Take a look at this week's highlights. ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAILGreer S.C. – Rally with Nikki Haley Here’s what South Carolinians are saying about Nikki Haley: “She’s very decisive, she's tough and she’s got a lot of energy,” the Sillstrops said. “She’s got backbone.” — Teresa Sillstrop “It’s time for us to get, number one, to get a lady to be president of the United States, and to have one that’s honest and has good Christian values.” — Dr. Bill Chandler ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da3690c2b1675987e9f934d2190bdd90ee4d60c5c389130f92c57ed26c1c62a831b08b2c79c5a83d1a375c10252b3306b7bec08ce34eb486aa3b9c WHNS , 5/4/23) “I really wanted to have this country back to where it can be, and every single word that came out of her mouth, I absolutely loved. I applauded. I screamed. I clapped.” — Linda Rush, ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da36908a92b8f1b28878353f9fbfcd24d0049b14bfeaf2fccd278e7ce5c5399b0f684306272351ced64a8199336f1e51e829cdafda59c900fa4060 WHNS , 5/4/23) “I’ve been an Independent, never voted Republican…until now. I will vote for her.” — Thomas Swenson ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da3690682417d48c238125fa54f17c7d348ce76bd4366df6fefee6e6a8760032c99699e8bb9055e16cb8954803efe980c88d86f548783bbe733b31 WHNS , 5/4/23) “I really go for Nikki Haley above some of the other candidates; she's already got international experience.” — Victoria Clardy ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da369034a306e7883cb6bdfcd5be2ec5dbec134e832825cd2df806121a5ce79405debf2cc71d498d8c3773ef79ed6e2061ee09cadbe364deb86a61 WYFF , 5/5/23) IN THE NEWS Read Nikki’s op-ed: https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da36903ea487c779d1ac6fb384d1b9d660a9e8df2c5ca63b68d54a6af397c45c0cdfd38f0ac18e1890557ccbbccd91366c38faef03655716053899 Nikki Haley: It’s time for a competency test for politicians. Here’s why “America needs a new generation of leaders to renew our national strength and pride. It’s why I support term limits for members of Congress, and why I’ve called for mental competency tests for politicians over the age of 75. To most Americans, this is common sense. But many political and media elites scoff at these ideas. When I first called for competency tests, recently fired CNN host Don Lemon said I was the one “past my prime.” Why? Because, in his mind, that describes all women over 50. He was widely and deservedly criticized for his backward views. But what’s incredible is how the Washington establishment continues to cover for those who likely lack the mental acuity to do their job. Take Sen. Dianne Feinstein. She’s a trailblazer who’s made an indelible mark in public service. But it’s been obvious for quite some time that she’s in significant mental and physical decline. She’s missed months of votes and clearly can no longer do her job. I agree with several congressional Democrats who say Feinstein should resign immediately and let someone else who is able to do the job take over. At 89 years old, she is a prime example of why we need mental competency tests for politicians. Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi defends Feinstein, claiming that calls for her resignation are sexist. Pelosi said, “I’ve never seen them go after a man who was sick in the Senate.” As I said after Mr. Lemon’s comments, “Madam Speaker, hold my beer.” This is not about whether someone is a woman. It’s about whether they are up to the job. The best case for such tests is in fact a man. He’s a former senator and the sitting president. Joe Biden announced his bid for re-election last week. If he wins next November, he will be 82 years old when he takes the oath of office, and 86 at the end of a second term. That would surpass the oldest president in American history by nine years. That’s not a problem in itself, but millions of Americans watch President Biden and believe he exhibits cognitive decline. He rarely takes press questions. He spends most weekends at his vacation home in Delaware. Sadly, he often seems disoriented and confused. Yet the public can’t know for sure without a cognitive test, which Biden has either not taken or declines to publish as part of his medical records.” https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da36903ea487c779d1ac6fb384d1b9d660a9e8df2c5ca63b68d54a6af397c45c0cdfd38f0ac18e1890557ccbbccd91366c38faef03655716053899 Read More >> Faulkner Focus – Does Joe Biden Know What Country He’s In? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da3690853f36cd574cec34c4903b3d4a80b4d63f97d419fa5638e630bff52a3592147640977341516f612035dd853d8ec5148f4f6a31ab8100fc9d https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da3690853f36cd574cec34c4903b3d4a80b4d63f97d419fa5638e630bff52a3592147640977341516f612035dd853d8ec5148f4f6a31ab8100fc9d WATCH NOW → Read More: Byron York:“By bringing the age subject to the forefront, Haley has made a real contribution to the presidential race. Everybody knows Biden is too old for another term — he's too old for this one — but Democrats have fallen in line behind the president because they don't see any credible alternative. That's especially concerning given the prospect of Vice President Kamala Harris, whom no one wants to become president, as first in line behind the oldest chief executive in history.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da369048f29a1c640a311399c51352cb4ccd4a7cf05c875434bfc6fdf7af608de844449512cc3cb507476a2425f8a74ecca158439343adbfa9588f Washington Examiner, 5/2/23 ) Woman on the Street – Mental Competency Tests Team Haley took the question directly to the people and here’s what they had to say about mental competency tests for aging politicians. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da3690f1abf4f6e0d679c5c60122774b12787f9edd4410e5041a9b9b6bc9797cdae755b1f615ed048bab2b63493e4dab1f5a141f6572df1e062de2 >">Watch now. >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da3690f1abf4f6e0d679c5c60122774b12787f9edd4410e5041a9b9b6bc9797cdae755b1f615ed048bab2b63493e4dab1f5a141f6572df1e062de2 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d181f7804da3690f1abf4f6e0d679c5c60122774b12787f9edd4410e5041a9b9b6bc9797cdae755b1f615ed048bab2b63493e4dab1f5a141f6572df1e062de2 WATCH NOW UPCOMING EVENTS: Nikki will be back in Iowa and New Hampshire soon!
