Nikki also held yet another standing-room-only rally, this time in Greer, SC. The crowd was fired up! Hundreds of people showed up to meet Nikki and hear more about her mission to save America! Take a look at this week's highlights. ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAILGreer S.C. – Rally with Nikki Haley Here’s what South Carolinians are saying about Nikki Haley: “She’s very decisive, she's tough and she’s got a lot of energy,” the Sillstrops said. “She’s got backbone.” — Teresa Sillstrop “It’s time for us to get, number one, to get a lady to be president of the United States, and to have one that’s honest and has good Christian values.” — Dr. Bill Chandler ( WHNS , 5/4/23) “I really wanted to have this country back to where it can be, and every single word that came out of her mouth, I absolutely loved. I applauded. I screamed. I clapped.” — Linda Rush, ( WHNS , 5/4/23) “I’ve been an Independent, never voted Republican…until now. I will vote for her.” — Thomas Swenson ( WHNS , 5/4/23) “I really go for Nikki Haley above some of the other candidates; she's already got international experience.” — Victoria Clardy ( WYFF , 5/5/23) IN THE NEWS Read Nikki’s op-ed: Nikki Haley: It’s time for a competency test for politicians. Here’s why “America needs a new generation of leaders to renew our national strength and pride. It’s why I support term limits for members of Congress, and why I’ve called for mental competency tests for politicians over the age of 75. To most Americans, this is common sense. But many political and media elites scoff at these ideas. When I first called for competency tests, recently fired CNN host Don Lemon said I was the one “past my prime.” Why? Because, in his mind, that describes all women over 50. He was widely and deservedly criticized for his backward views. But what’s incredible is how the Washington establishment continues to cover for those who likely lack the mental acuity to do their job. Take Sen. Dianne Feinstein. She’s a trailblazer who’s made an indelible mark in public service. But it’s been obvious for quite some time that she’s in significant mental and physical decline. She’s missed months of votes and clearly can no longer do her job. I agree with several congressional Democrats who say Feinstein should resign immediately and let someone else who is able to do the job take over. At 89 years old, she is a prime example of why we need mental competency tests for politicians. Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi defends Feinstein, claiming that calls for her resignation are sexist. Pelosi said, “I’ve never seen them go after a man who was sick in the Senate.” As I said after Mr. Lemon’s comments, “Madam Speaker, hold my beer.” This is not about whether someone is a woman. It’s about whether they are up to the job. The best case for such tests is in fact a man. He’s a former senator and the sitting president. Joe Biden announced his bid for re-election last week. If he wins next November, he will be 82 years old when he takes the oath of office, and 86 at the end of a second term. That would surpass the oldest president in American history by nine years. That’s not a problem in itself, but millions of Americans watch President Biden and believe he exhibits cognitive decline. He rarely takes press questions. He spends most weekends at his vacation home in Delaware. Sadly, he often seems disoriented and confused. Yet the public can’t know for sure without a cognitive test, which Biden has either not taken or declines to publish as part of his medical records.” Read More >> Faulkner Focus – Does Joe Biden Know What Country He’s In? WATCH NOW → Read More: Byron York:“By bringing the age subject to the forefront, Haley has made a real contribution to the presidential race. Everybody knows Biden is too old for another term — he's too old for this one — but Democrats have fallen in line behind the president because they don't see any credible alternative. That's especially concerning given the prospect of Vice President Kamala Harris, whom no one wants to become president, as first in line behind the oldest chief executive in history.” ( Washington Examiner, 5/2/23 ) Woman on the Street – Mental Competency Tests Team Haley took the question directly to the people and here’s what they had to say about mental competency tests for aging politicians. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWYGDv7D6N

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

I am fearful that legal persecution will intensify
against Americans holding to faith-based values

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWYGDv7D6N

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61771877:WYGDv7D6N:m:3:2532013465:0C60001464CB5BF5E911BE22EECF76EF:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWYGDv7D6N

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. **Out-of-state billionaire Richard Uihlein is bankrolling Republican efforts to effectively END citizen-led ballot initiatives in Ohio.**

Uihlein has reportedly already funneled more than $1 million into Ohio to persuade House Republicans to vote on a measure that would strip away power from Ohio voters. Worse: if Republicans and Uihlein get their way, Ohio taxpayers will have to shell out $20 million to pay for a sham August special election to vote on this measure.

Listen, Republican politicians know they're on the wrong side of the issues that are important to working Ohioans. That's why they're bringing in an out-of-state billionaire to effectively **BUY** our state constitution and stop citizen-led ballot initiatives.

Right now, amendments need just a simple majority to pass in Ohio. But if extreme Republicans get their way, they'll raise that threshold to a 60% majority, making it nearly impossible for Ohioans to shape our own state constitution.

It's despicable, and we need to hear your thoughts right away: **[Do you support Republican efforts to effectively END citizen-led ballot initiatives in Ohio? name: Hillary Scholten
subject: why we can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
If we’re going to hold this seat and retake the House majority for Democrats in 2024, we need to be surpassing all of our fundraising goals starting now.

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62901006/404915426/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230506-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWViZWI5Yy0yMGVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EzyI1qUF7a_5QYCmOnGxF_Tc9KnIQhX0MJPCB68-WWo=)
---
Hi there,

As I reach out to voters and supporters across Michigan and the country to secure investments for my re-election campaign, I keep hearing the same thing: folks telling me that they don’t usually get involved in campaigns this early in the cycle.

Believe me, I get it – it can feel like the 2022 election just wrapped up and the 2024 election is ages away. But the truth is that fundraising at this point in the election cycle determines the kinds of long-term investments we’re able to make in crucial resources like campaign staff and voter outreach.

**In short, if we’re going to hold this seat and retake the House majority for Democrats in 2024, we need to be surpassing all of our fundraising goals starting _now._** [_**With that in mind, can I count on you to make a contribution of any amount – even $5 makes a difference! – right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62901007/404915427/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230506-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWViZWI5Yy0yMGVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EzyI1qUF7a_5QYCmOnGxF_Tc9KnIQhX0MJPCB68-WWo=)

clean_body: If we’re going to hold this seat and retake the House majority for Democrats in 2024, we need to be surpassing all of our fundraising goals starting now. | = Hi there, As I reach out to voters and supporters across Michigan and the country to secure investments for my re-election campaign, I keep hearing the same thing: folks telling me that they don’t usually get involved in campaigns this early in the cycle. Believe me, I get it – it can feel like the 2022 election just wrapped up and the 2024 election is ages away. But the truth is that fundraising at this point in the election cycle determines the kinds of long-term investments we’re able to make in crucial resources like campaign staff and voter outreach. In short, if we’re going to hold this seat and retake the House majority for Democrats in 2024, we need to be surpassing all of our fundraising goals starting now. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Endlessly grateful for your support, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: MO-mentum in Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We need your help to keep it going, Peter
#
We’re seeing some serious MO-mentum, Peter.
Since Lucas Kunce launched his campaign to replace Josh Hawley, he’s earned support from former statewide leaders like Auditor Susan Montee, labor groups representing tens of thousands of workers like the Kansas City Building Trades, and national organizations like Social Security Works PAC. **But now, we’ve got to keep it going.**
GOP insiders and political pundits are using anything they can find to evaluate the strength of Lucas + our grassroots movement — and we need to keep proving that we’re building the people-powered campaign that can win.
**[So Peter, will you join the tens of thousands of grassroots supporters standing behind Lucas by personally endorsing his campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230506_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=3086%2E614464%2E9C-LPq)**
**[ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230506_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=3086%2E614464%2E9C-LPq)**
Lucas’ bold message of taking back power for working people has already put a national spotlight on Missouri’s U.S. Senate race. But Josh Hawley and all the GOP insiders lining up to support him are determined to tear our movement down.
It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of grassroots support to elect Lucas Kunce, defeat Josh Hawley, and finally put real working people in charge of our country — and that’s exactly why we’re reaching out for your support so early in this race. **So Peter:**
**[Will you join the national organizations, local leaders, and everyday people throwing their support behind Lucas Kunce by adding your personal endorsement today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230506_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=3086%2E614464%2E9C-LPq)**
**[ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230506_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=3086%2E614464%2E9C-LPq)**
Every endorsement, donation, and person like you sharing Lucas’ message early in this race could make all the difference on Election Day.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230506-3086-footer&t=5&refcode2=3086_614464_9C-LPq&akid=3086%2E614464%2E9C-LPq)**

The GOP sees taking Susie’s district as key to solidifying their House Majority — that's why they've spent nearly $20,000,000 attacking her since she was elected. The grassroots movement to hold this toss-up seat wasn’t built overnight. It’s been powered by supporters like you pitching in $5, $10, or even $25 when they can. Susie can’t take on this fight alone, so we're asking: Will you stand with Susie and help defend NV-03 by chipping in right now? | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148

Friend, Georgia decision-makers are trying to take away our First Amendment right to protest. Activists have been protesting attempts to build a $90 million training center for militarizing police, which would include a fake city for police to practice militarized tactics against civilians. Known as Cop City, the project would destroy a forest and devastate the watershed upon which nearby Black communities depend—communities who already face the brunt of police violence. **At least 42 people, including a legal observer, have been charged with domestic terrorism for being associated with protests against Cop City.** 1 The charges carry a sentence of up to 35 years in prison. With nearly no evidence and bogus charges (like mud on their shoes, sleeping in a forest, and “standing next to signs for anarchy”), the state is keeping these activists locked up without bail. [**Sign the petition to tell Georgia’s Attorney General Chris Carr: Stop criminalizing dissent. Drop the terrorism and felony charges against Cop City protesters!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mJE-CV_KSLSQT_cvjY3Q_cy9YU34xLQNOQQCh_7iTOdxH5iYh5EsrATjrasAo76_giT3PkOvskS3YwlhvLojcAwqo6a96AUF0UmeKlPcS_KrgTyEIMvb3ICuLwG1dWxgDKFGzNv3pVzck6M2-7OzittiwOgvRimIRi5xhKq2L6xtpRbNc61uQcRPUBXXhDooO74f1jPwWnb4TdjEWnu_0b3Lb7lEu4koqcJY5_4LfoLIgyCdzKaROD3gHs7GvdzQYgP09FxVqfsj1PcH3bVxWOImcicyRjPWg4i9hFlIo_j65GqdZEHHUzQ0fK932riBh3EKh4fFlO-OCBhyzGpd3AkLF_Ub79Ag3hwCzfaHiEN50gq2LlciJ7mA2XWvAbwhyRXjiFGwodHTeKiQAwoPpUcjTETYPiO775o4ErRbLFiuFIS3yB-MASFR-KfSoPIXN/3vy/yod5gZc3TH2A_QYgOSbJMQ/h1/0Y3HQlGOIWgH72ajrCZzrZXeQ6EdVvjgWtbk9TXyZWY) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mJE-CV_KSLSQT_cvjY3Q_cy9YU34xLQNOQQCh_7iTOdxH5iYh5EsrATjrasAo76_giT3PkOvskS3YwlhvLojcAwqo6a96AUF0UmeKlPcS_KrgTyEIMvb3ICuLwG1dWxgDKFGzNv3pVzck6M2-7OzittiwOgvRimIRi5xhKq2L6xtpRbNc61uQcRPUBXXhDooObbwgpaKj7eeuISgvNjWIWKD0-6S5s0VlB9eqwgmexJjdEkV_YJqsgPoTJ4SueokhFBJuGslmJpl2CJM-wueOOJCCtXpb3Fvu04QKnjQxUERVzjYgsYXtHbHjZm176oQIXxvqZseeu-m3yY6ek8jCShQx4yhfs4hg_DzqhrImtxoLnf7OaOBiWr2frQZAD_W__KryJEEXtCg84gPx-WVVH2vw8KKfjJradavOcXcxD8AeTDC839aFo3KVdYvaKrxo/3vy/yod5gZc3TH2A_QYgOSbJMQ/h2/5hFx39nNN-0W1VnqjnvSlfDBDXoPxVf9IAF_PVcJk7o)

Recent autopsies confirmed that one of the activists, known as “Tortuguita,” was executed in a hail of at least 57 bullets from cops who lied about Tortuguita shooting first. Tortuguita was shot while sitting with their arms raised.2
None of the officers involved in this unconscionable murder have been charged. Meanwhile, some activists were recently arrested for posting flyers that named one of the police officers who murdered Tortuguita.3 For simply telling the truth, those activists have been held without bail and in solitary confinement, charged with an outrageous felony (“intimidation of an officer of the state”).
**This extreme police overreach is an unconstitutional attempt to silence dissent, which violates our First Amendment rights and is meant to intimidate others from joining this movement against police violence.**
Human rights groups sent a letter to Georgia’s Attorney General and other officials, calling to drop the charges.4 Let’s show even more public support for these activists, for our right to protest, and for true justice and public safety.

| _**"When you are in black skin and you live in this country, then you can disagree with me."**_

This is one of the last things Don Lemon said live on air before he was fired, Fellow American.

_**... And you're sitting here, whatever ethnicity you are, explaining to me what it's like to be black in America."**_
---

_- Don Lemon_

We should be able to have open debate no matter our skin color. White, black, doesn't matter. It's time to start talking openly again. All of us.

I went head to head with Don Lemon, and won the debate. Facts and conservative values won the day. Now, Don Lemon is paying the price:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7ff533547f91491792664357a9f90b61&_e=4imIVqkTxPDpGudDxxN_NUGQewgZGqXgMQci1gorgt_szFzq0CkrRWj_5-DdOdyhnJxCpFH76lswQui3-LY19lV9ko9CcuIbCBsXMoexPptt-w7-8l329fxAMZqBMs_JDkqZpUi6_g6enGUbTwd5H40Fp9pgImkoSe4APSBgmZkaX-tqZ-QXM2LKIi15bXqFy84DDPwXLP2EyUUm4IHmNM7OW9Gpj3IOFJn9dg0I_xMJtRnj0Poy1OhB3kdWxeGA5MIb8c8-8fzLdQRPGhCgpb8SrvyPn4OinLg3335ZRwiX8TgrTpCqVNKY2y4PJbfIJwLpvEwf8k-8PznljO7GBTOQw5EryA5H140JZEBuS_hJxG5alSlFbmrYFCau_ynP3LGAQ3ofUh9soOtz-dcV_XKBJlsMQlHq7Aq_-sCyG4QY9DPqyCgl8BgZON86EM24)
**Fellow American, if you like the results from my interview with Don Lemon, imagine what I can accomplish through spirited debate in Washington.**

_Things might have STARTED with Don Lemon, but I am far from finished._

When I am President of the United States, I won't back down from the Left's nasty attacks. I will continue to debate them where we can win - on conservative values.

Unlike the DNC and Democrat insiders, Republicans are building a pathway for *real debate* this primary season. I know I will be a leader there, but only if I make the main debate stage this August.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

And you're sitting here, whatever ethnicity you are, explaining to me what it's like to be black in America." - Don Lemon We should be able to have open debate no matter our skin color. White, black, doesn't matter. It's time to start talking openly again. All of us. I went head to head with Don Lemon, and won the debate. Facts and conservative values won the day. Now, Don Lemon is paying the price: Fellow American, if you like the results from my interview with Don Lemon, imagine what I can accomplish through spirited debate in Washington. Things might have STARTED with Don Lemon, but I am far from finished. When I am President of the United States, I won't back down from the Left's nasty attacks. I will continue to debate them where we can win - on conservative values. Unlike the DNC and Democrat insiders, Republicans are building a pathway for real debate this primary season. I know I will be a leader there, but only if I make the main debate stage this August. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. subject: DeSantis’ visit to Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=258%2E35263%2E6UrrCw ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hi Peter —

In case you missed the news, Ron DeSantis is in Wisconsin headlining a GOP
fundraiser today.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230506_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=258%2E35263%2E6UrrCw ]Can you rush in $10 or any amount in support of Tammy’s campaign and
our work to keep Wisconsin blue?

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230506_AM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=258%2E35263%2E6UrrCw ]DONATE

As DeSantis is on his “book tour,” a clear disguise for his upcoming
presidential campaign, it’s no surprise that he’s making a stop here in
Wisconsin.

Our state has served as the “tipping point” in the last several
presidential elections, sending Donald Trump to the White House in 2016,
and President Biden in 2020. Election experts are already saying our state
could decide the presidency once again next year — and this time, voters
here could decide the Senate majority with it.

That’s why Republicans are already targeting Wisconsin. They know if they
squeak by and win here, they’ll have a pretty good shot at taking the
White House and handing the Senate majority back over to Mitch McConnell.
And they’re going to do and spend whatever it takes to make that happen.

Between DeSantis’ book tour stop (aka campaign stop) today and picking
Milwaukee as the site for the Republican National Convention next year,
Republicans have made it clear that their sights are set on winning
Wisconsin. We’ll need all hands on deck to fight back.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230506_AM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=258%2E35263%2E6UrrCw ]Peter, our
work here in Wisconsin is going to be crucial in our fight to hold onto
the White House and our Democratic Senate majority. Can you pitch in $10
or any amount to support Tammy’s campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-may23.oFPjTV&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230506_AM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=258%2E35263%2E6UrrCw ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

Thank you so much for supporting Tammy, today and always.

— Scott

name: Biden Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: 2024
body:
Now that President Biden has officially announced he’s running for re-election, he’s going to need a strong coalition of supporters up and down the ballot. | | |
---
| | **🚨Now that President Biden has officially announced he’s running for re-election, he’s going to need a strong coalition of supporters in your state and nationwide.** [_**Will you split a donation of**$10** between the Biden-Harris re-election campaign and the DLCC’s Grassroots Victory PAC to support our Democratic agenda from our statehouses to the White House? **_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yL3CVsFdvppaiKa7AmChaWWtnMPLSKY-6UmbzA7kW2VQjc6CsJ6zgfXpM2KH5S_dN-XtWA6NTLRR0QXUzAnlAyIP37JL9t7p_CsgSsBcSOmWKN0dd-jr4INCVy7dte8bC-wef9SawqT7hHLZtXATRiD1SylYkc5YqQAcEL0bsI0eG98XCkezrQXruiOI8yFvQX0O9LqvNujv5wfxcrDNXsrpT55jQ0Ml7rNzm6LvgqGBa7ZT069Mt7RbcsqVSL30q01jY8_kRhSx_ZsIDqxK95NmvxwB4XDMbm2xPfdAWLveO0MBLWNbZkbcP6dnzBBHwlod-SMfpB4e4o7DGXFYTSc2EhHcB4CmMU1nDtE9udkA/3vy/Qwk8pjFaSDanT1CESMAlgw/h0/AnHLj7LCFlvRKmfrDGXhXFXXMxlKREEYvZJjca9pnls)
* * *
President Biden has had an incredible first term in office – from investing in infrastructure and strengthening gun safety to creating _millions_ of new jobs and defending our democracy from MAGA extremism, he’s ushered in historic progress. **That’s why it’s critical that we give him the grassroots support he needs to win re-election and elect Democrats who will help pass his agenda in statehouses nationwide.** Re-electing President Biden and expanding our Democratic power in the states is a huge task – and it’ll take the full strength of this grassroots team. **So with 2024 on the horizon, we’re asking you to commit to this fight.** [_**We need grassroots supporters in your state and across the country to help Democrats hit the ground running to re-elect President Biden and build our power in state legislatures. We’re sick and tired of conservative officials using their offices to advance the will of a loud, radical minority. In March, Governor Lee signed extremist, right-wing legislation into law banning life-saving gender-affirming care for minors in Tennessee. Tennessee Republicans are fixated on playing doctor and making medical decisions that infringe on every person’s right to privacy. Medical decisions should remain between a patient and their care team — and that doesn’t include the Republican Party of Tennessee. [**Stand with TNDP and opponents of this ban right now by adding your name today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62903495/404925405/704902854?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjhkYWIyOS0yOWVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hWFiOgNJl35_HksAtwhKsMmeamxrNYbMGXfrQtiBiHs=&emci=3fbe1702-5deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8b8dab29-29ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892) | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62903496/404925406/704902854?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjhkYWIyOS0yOWVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hWFiOgNJl35_HksAtwhKsMmeamxrNYbMGXfrQtiBiHs=&emci=3fbe1702-5deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8b8dab29-29ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)

Gender-affirming care is life-saving, and we won’t let the GOP continue to enact its extremist agenda.
[**Add your name right now to demand the courts halt the ban on gender-affirming care.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62903497/404925407/704902854?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjhkYWIyOS0yOWVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hWFiOgNJl35_HksAtwhKsMmeamxrNYbMGXfrQtiBiHs=&emci=3fbe1702-5deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8b8dab29-29ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62904846/404930347/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230506LGBTQ+_N_TEAM_90do_3_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljMTJkMDk1LTJlZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Y_t-KCEJldW7tLiGfEPEo9jfKFY1slnLqZxbvabRa6Q=)
| We are so happy to report some great news!

The Fairness Act has finally passed the PA House, bringing our state one step closer to prohibiting discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity or expression.

**The bill was first introduced 22 years ago.** Its passage at long last — and the near-total Republican opposition to it even today — is a reminder of the importance of elections and continuing our progress to expand the electorate and mobilizing voters to vote their values. **[This is a HUGE step in the right direction for our Commonwealth, but the fight is far from over. In just ten days, we have another special election that will determine the majority of the PA House. Will you pitch in $10 right now to help us keep up the fight for all our rights and get out the vote?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62904847/404930348/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230506LGBTQ+_N_TEAM_90do_3_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljMTJkMDk1LTJlZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Y_t-KCEJldW7tLiGfEPEo9jfKFY1slnLqZxbvabRa6Q=)** name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We need to re-elect Senator Tammy Baldwin, the great progressive from Wisconsin. We can't afford another Ron Johnson (R-WI) in the Senate.
body:
We don’t want another Ron Johnson
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27628c66-589a-4b87-b629-b09b1c91dac3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[We can't afford another Ron Johnson (R-WI) in the Senate. We absolutely must re-elect Senator Tammy Baldwin, the great progressive from Wisconsin.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T483ff594-fcd4-47b5-b95a-64d866548a74/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** _Let me remind you about treasonous, bag-of-bricks-for-a-brain Senator Johnson, who took a pilgrimage to Putin on July 4th, 2018, returning repeating Russian talking points like a parrot. A rabid anti-vaxxer, anti-choicer and AR-15 promoter who recently spoke in a hearing about how climate change would be good for the U.S:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6db12c90-98ca-440f-a873-5d8388623caf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_An all-around disaster, and worst of all we lost to him by a measly 1% in 2022(!), leaving us stuck with this human waste of space for six more years. 1%!!_** _His polar opposite Tammy Baldwin's up for reelection. Baldwin, the first open Senate lesbian, is a stalwart abortion rights supporter, democracy-defender & gun safety proponent good on every issue from climate change to higher wages._**_ Like Sherrod Brown & Raphael Warnock--a Senator from a purple-to-red state as progressive as blue-state colleagues. We need her courage in the Senate._** **_Republicans are recruiting someone as corrupt, stupid & treasonous as Johnson to take on Baldwin, like former Koch-Bros-owned-Gov. Scott Walker, or GOP governor candidate in 2022, Tim Michels. He said if he were elected governor, Republicans "will never lose another election." There's a word for that. It isn't democracy._** _We can't lose Baldwin's passion, smarts and perspective in the Senate, and can't allow an authoritarian clod to win, or we'll have another Johson in the Senate, doing Putin's bidding while claiming vaccines are deadly and climate change is great._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp in giving super-Sen. Baldwin $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to keep the progressive purple state Senator in DC fighting for us?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8cec25ed-b763-4aa8-9c7c-e923a72dcfc4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for rejecting Ron-Johnson-type Senators, and fighting to keep their opposites, superb Senators like Tammy Baldwin._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16732da3-bc70-48b6-9fcc-1406e4693c53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ryan=20Chamberlin=20for=20State=20Representative?=
subject: Early Voting Starts in Marion County, Saturday, May 6, 2023
body:
Early Voting Starts in Marion County, Saturday, May 6, 2023 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/voteryanchamberlin/conservative-businessman-ryan-chamberlin-512287?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | | **EARLY VOTING BEGINS IN MARION COUNTY!**
---
| Hey Everybody — early voting is underway! Today, 4 **early voting** locations have opened in Marion County for us to begin voting early for the **General Election** , which will be held just 10 days from now on **Tuesday, May 16th**. CLICK BELOW FOR EARLY VOTING INFO & LOCATIONS
---
| [Early Voting Locations](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=ac7867a8fb&e=d1c1b9864f "Early Voting Locations")
---
| [ ](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=e5c7fde5d1&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
|
---
| I don’t know if you saw the news earlier this week, but the **US Navy** has now hired a drag queen to help them recruit more diversity for their ranks. This kind of **woke insanity is exactly what needs to be stopped** in this country before it is too late. I am proud to have the opportunity to go serve with **Gov. Ron DeSantis** to push back on this radical agenda. But I can’t do it without you. I am encouraging you to go vote and send a strong signal that our community is ready to **take a stand against Joe Biden**.

This week we have also had the honor to unleash two more endorsements from **Sheriff Billy Woods** and **State Senator Keith Perry**. Next week, we will unveil even more, and I am committed to campaigning as hard as we can until the final vote is counted.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail again soon. Until then, keep the faith.

Sincerely,

P.S. Don’t be fooled by the Democrats. Many of them are saying that it is a foregone conclusion that we are going to win and are trying to make it seem like they don’t care. What they are hoping for is that conservatives won’t take this election seriously and give them something to talk about in the national press. **Let’s turn out the vote and win!**
---
| | **IMPORTANT VOTING INFORMATION**
---
| **Special General Election**

Only registered voters who live within House District 24 are eligible to vote in this election.

Voter Registration Deadline: April 17, 2023

Early Voting: May 6, 2023, to May 13, 2023, Sites open from 10 AM to 6 PM

Mail Ballot Request Deadline: May 6, 2023, by 5 PM
Mail ballots must be received by the Supervisor of Elections office by 7 PM Election Day to be counted

**Election Day: May 16, 2023 - Polls open from 7 AM to 7 PM **

---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=85aab43559&e=d1c1b9864f "LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE")
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._
Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative526 E Park AveTallahassee, FL 32301-2568
[Add us to your address book](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=689ada9728) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=689ada9728).

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Know a nurse?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62906701/404937180/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjViY2Y4Yi0zMWVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CNVxSOsf598QkVdgD5auDC4L4uOB9wq9aeQutWTYhk=&emci=9ff242c3-2eec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0b5bcf8b-31ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | **Nurses are critical to our health care system, to our country, and to each of us individually.** They are first responders in a crisis – from the pandemic to mass shootings to the tens of thousands of individual emergencies that happen every day. They're also deeply engaged in taking care of folks with chronic diseases and in preventive care, ensuring that people stay as healthy as they can be. **Today is National Nurses Day – a day to celebrate and honor these everyday heroes; people who work hard to help everyone they come into contact with.** They devote their lives to helping you, me, and everyone live happier and healthier lives. **My amazing wife and partner, Mary, is a hospice nurse.** I have seen how dedicated she is and the lengths she and her colleagues will go to provide care at the end of life to their patients and their families. clean_body: | | | | Nurses are critical to our health care system, to our country, and to each of us individually. They are first responders in a crisis – from the pandemic to mass shootings to the tens of thousands of individual emergencies that happen every day. They're also deeply engaged in taking care of folks with chronic diseases and in preventive care, ensuring that people stay as healthy as they can be. Today is National Nurses Day – a day to celebrate and honor these everyday heroes; people who work hard to help everyone they come into contact with. They devote their lives to helping you, me, and everyone live happier and healthier lives. My amazing wife and partner, Mary, is a hospice nurse. I have seen how dedicated she is and the lengths she and her colleagues will go to provide care at the end of life to their patients and their families. We cannot thank nurses enough for the sacrifices they and their families make, but on this National Nurses Day let's all tell them how much we appreciate them. Please join me on social media —, or— to tell your story about a nurse that made a difference to you or someone you loved. Or, if social media isn't your thing, pick up the phone and tell a nurse how much you appreciate their hard work and dedication in caring for others. Here's to all the nurses out there! name: David Trone
subject: abortion survey (please respond)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Hey there –

Ever since Roe was overturned last summer, states have been rolling back the clock on reproductive rights left and right.

The Governor of North Dakota just signed a law banning nearly all abortions.

Abortion-ban ordinances are picking up steam in New Mexico.

A six-week abortion ban was just signed into Florida law.

I know where I stand (spoiler alert: reproductive health care choices should be between patient and doctor), but I need to hear from you.

Should abortion be legal in Maryland? >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/Nmgo5hKHYkyiEvtS5AiHRQ2

This is one of the most pressing issues of our time, so I’m hoping I hear from you ASAP.

Thanks for letting me know,

David Trone

Take the Survey >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/Nmgo5hKHYkyiEvtS5AiHRQ2

Fellow Democrats,

Next Friday, notorious Florida extremist **Ron DeSantis** will be in Peoria, where he will be **the keynote speaker** for the Peoria & Tazewell Counties Republican “Lincoln Day” Dinner.

Just off the heels of DeSantis signing a fresh barrage of the cruelest and most reactionary laws of 2023, it’s clear the IL GOP are doubling down on their out-of-touch extremism.

**But we know the people of Illinois have had more than enough of these right-wing radicals. We saw in 2022 & just last month in the municipal elections, when fringe conservatives have run for public office, voters have rejected them.**

**[Our plan to make this visit backfire on him and his Illinois allies is well on its way to success – but we’re not quite on track to meeting our $3,000 goal before his speech. name: Katie Porter
subject: teaching/learning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22421%2E3422442%2E0e9Fue)
Before being elected to Congress in 2018 I was a law professor at UC Irvine. I loved being around students, getting to be both a teacher and learning new things constantly.
My job in Congress isn’t all that different. When it comes down to it, being a Member of Congress is about _teaching and learning._
**My job is to _learn_ from Californians about what problems they’re facing.** I also learn from witnesses during congressional hearings. Sometimes the information I learn is really valuable, and other times we learn that they have no business being in a position of power. I’m also always learning from policy experts as we consider the best way to tackle big problems.
**It’s also my job to _teach_ people about what’s going on in Congress and how it relates to them.** I know that most people don’t watch the news all day and only tune in if they have a few extra minutes—and that’s why I try to get my message across quickly and effectively. I aim to show people how policy made in Washington determines all sorts of things—from access to abortion to what your prescription will cost.
That brings us to the whiteboard. **As a teacher, I’ve spent years using a whiteboard to break things down, so it was only natural that I brought my whiteboard to Congress.** It’s an effective tool. And it’s fun!
I’m running for the U.S. Senate so we can do this on a larger scale. Senators sit on twice as many committees as House Members, so just think...double the whiteboards!
I can’t do this without your help. **[Can you make a gift of $5 today to help power our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230506-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH06_1_TAL_20230506_V1_F&refcode2=22421_3422442_0e9Fue&akid=22421%2E3422442%2E0e9Fue)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230506-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH06_1_TAL_20230506_V1_F&refcode2=22421_3422442_0e9Fue&akid=22421%2E3422442%2E0e9Fue)**
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH06_1_TAL_20230506_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=22421_3422442_0e9Fue&akid=22421%2E3422442%2E0e9Fue)**

clean_body: Before being elected to Congress in 2018 I was a law professor at UC Irvine. I loved being around students, getting to be both a teacher and learning new things constantly. My job in Congress isn’t all that different. When it comes down to it, being a Member of Congress is about teaching and learning. My job is to learn from Californians about what problems they’re facing. I also learn from witnesses during congressional hearings. Sometimes the information I learn is really valuable, and other times we learn that they have no business being in a position of power. I’m also always learning from policy experts as we consider the best way to tackle big problems. It’s also my job to teach people about what’s going on in Congress and how it relates to them. I know that most people don’t watch the news all day and only tune in if they have a few extra minutes—and that’s why I try to get my message across quickly and effectively. I aim to show people how policy made in Washington determines all sorts of things—from access to abortion to what your prescription will cost. That brings us to the whiteboard. As a teacher, I’ve spent years using a whiteboard to break things down, so it was only natural that I brought my whiteboard to Congress. It’s an effective tool. And it’s fun! I’m running for the U.S. Senate so we can do this on a larger scale. Senators sit on twice as many committees as House Members, so just think...double the whiteboards! I can’t do this without your help. Katie Porter Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62912186/404945871/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDUxMDQwMDMtM2FlYy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Sxul-MTPwWc6BF6fNo3-SiHS6cpA6Jrbcbp6oOLpj1k=) Friend,

In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in a **[$3 donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62912187/404945872/62647395?refcode=em-5.6.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDUxMDQwMDMtM2FlYy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Sxul-MTPwWc6BF6fNo3-SiHS6cpA6Jrbcbp6oOLpj1k=)** to my campaign for Congress. I know it may seem early for political giving, but I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why your early support is so crucial for our success.

Earlier this year, Adam Schiff announced he is running for Senate, which would leave the 30th District vacant come 2024. I made the decision to throw my hat in the ring because so much is on the line – reproductive freedoms, our environment, the economic well-being of millions of Americans, and the stability of our very democracy.

We need leaders in Washington with experience and a track record of making substantive progress, and I’ve been humbled to be starting with a strong base of endorsements and support from this community.

**It's no secret that winning a congressional race can be _very expensive,_ and unlike others in this race, I’m counting on individual donors to fuel this campaign. That’s why we need to gather resources as early as possible, and it’s why meeting tonight’s $7,000 fundraising goal is so important.**

I know it may seem early for political giving, but I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why your early support is so crucial for our success. Earlier this year, Adam Schiff announced he is running for Senate, which would leave the 30th District vacant come 2024. I made the decision to throw my hat in the ring because so much is on the line – reproductive freedoms, our environment, the economic well-being of millions of Americans, and the stability of our very democracy. name: Redistricting Alert | NDRC
subject: POLITICO: Gerrymandering could “more than double” GOP’s House margin by 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
If you thought redistricting was over, think again
|
---

**Team, if you thought redistricting was over until the next census, think again.** According to _POLITICO_ , Republican plans for “ambitious gerrymandering” in key states could have a huge impact on the next election: **“Republicans could more than double their five-seat House majority through redistricting alone. That would give Speaker Kevin McCarthy a much-needed cushion in 2024.”
_– POLITICO_

[_Support the fight for fair maps in 2024: Donate to the NDRC >>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62912232/404945921/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230506_FR_5E_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzNzhkOWVhLTM5ZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Dv4Qh0hsT2WMtVsg-76111w2t7IqHLSnUR7-EHEsaZs=)** In states like Ohio, Republicans are fighting to defeat challenges to rigged maps. And in North Carolina, GOP lawmakers are asking the state’s highest court to roll back fair maps so the legislature can redraw them – even though the state constitution _explicitly_ prohibits mid-decade redistricting!

**It’s an unprecedented power grab, team. Will you pitch in now to help us fight back nationwide?** [**_Help stop GOP map manipulators nationwide: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62912233/404945922/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230506_FR_5E_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzNzhkOWVhLTM5ZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Dv4Qh0hsT2WMtVsg-76111w2t7IqHLSnUR7-EHEsaZs=) **Here’s the good news: The NDRC’s grassroots movement has a proven track record of defeating these kinds of attacks on our democracy.**

Earlier this month, fair maps advocates overcame millions in spending from right-wing donors and helped elect a fair-minded justice to Wisconsin’s state supreme court. And last November, our movement helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.”

With more redistricting on the horizon, we have two options: **OPTION ONE:
We can do nothing and let the GOP roll back our progress.**

Years from now, we’ll look back on the 2022 election as the high watermark for fair maps, after which the GOP returned to unchecked gerrymandering.

**OPTION TWO:
We can continue fighting for _even fairer_ maps in 2024 and beyond!**

Years from now, we can look back and know we did everything we could to strengthen our democracy.

**With conservative lawmakers hell-bent on tearing down our fair maps progress, we simply cannot afford to grow complacent. So please: Will you help the NDRC keep fighting with a donation of any amount today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: If you thought redistricting was over, think again | Team, if you thought redistricting was over until the next census, think again. According to POLITICO , Republican plans for “ambitious gerrymandering” in key states could have a huge impact on the next election: “Republicans could more than double their five-seat House majority through redistricting alone. That would give Speaker Kevin McCarthy a much-needed cushion in 2024.” – POLITICO = In states like Ohio, Republicans are fighting to defeat challenges to rigged maps. And in North Carolina, GOP lawmakers are asking the state’s highest court to roll back fair maps so the legislature can redraw them – even though the state constitution explicitly prohibits mid-decade redistricting! It’s an unprecedented power grab, team. Will you pitch in now to help us fight back nationwide? = Here’s the good news: The NDRC’s grassroots movement has a proven track record of defeating these kinds of attacks on our democracy. Earlier this month, fair maps advocates overcame millions in spending from right-wing donors and helped elect a fair-minded justice to Wisconsin’s state supreme court. And last November, our movement helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” With more redistricting on the horizon, we have two options: OPTION ONE: We can do nothing and let the GOP roll back our progress. Years from now, we’ll look back on the 2022 election as the high watermark for fair maps, after which the GOP returned to unchecked gerrymandering. OPTION TWO: We can continue fighting for even fairer maps in 2024 and beyond! Years from now, we can look back and know we did everything we could to strengthen our democracy. With conservative lawmakers hell-bent on tearing down our fair maps progress, we simply cannot afford to grow complacent. So please: Will you help the NDRC keep fighting with a donation of any amount today? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = As President Obama recently reminded us, “Redistricting is no longer a once-a-decade event. The fight for fair maps is happening right now.” He’s absolutely right. If you’re still with us, = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: AOC Organizing Team
subject: We stand in solidarity with the Writers Guild of America.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Get involved, donate, or show solidarity on social media.
#
What are your favorite TV shows right now? For Alexandria, the answer is “Severance” and “What We Do in the Shadows.”
Well, in case you missed it: this past Tuesday, all the writers of your favorite TV shows and movies went on strike to demand better treatment from Hollywood production studios.
The Writers Guild of America last went on strike in 2007 – for 100 days – to secure fair wages as studio profit increased dramatically.
16 years later, the situation is similar: production budgets have sharply increased, while pay for writers has declined by 4% over the past decade — 23% when adjusted for inflation. In terms of contracts, roughly 50% of writers are paid at the legal minimum, compared to 33% a decade ago. 1
And the writers most impacted by declining pay? Are often people of color, women, and members of the LGBTQIA community. **All of this is happening while eight Hollywood CEOs pocketed $773 million between them in 2022 alone.**
Here’s how you can support the striking Writers Guild of America workers today:
💪 **[Donate funds for snacks to strikers in LA.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18245?t=1&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m) **DSA Los Angeles has launched The Snacklist to support striking WGA members with food. All funds will be used to support future labor actions in LA with snacks.
💪 **[Join writers at the picket line.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18226?t=2&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m) **Take a look at the Strike Schedule and stand in solidarity with signs, snacks, and energy as WGA members advocate for themselves.
💪 **[Donate to the Entertainment Community Fund.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18227?t=3&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m)** Formerly The Actors Fund, the ECF’s emergency financial assistance program offers emergency financial assistance to support performing arts workers who are unable to pay their basic living expenses. This includes housing, food, utility bills and healthcare.
💪 **[Amplify the WGA’s message on social media.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18228?t=4&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m)** The Guild has put together a social media toolkit to share information and solidarity, if you aren’t able to donate.
💪 **Don’t cross the picket line.** You may start to see online calls for ‘pitch contests’ or ‘fan casting’ – avoid them! These can sometimes be ways for studios or producers to crowdsource ideas from the public for free and circumvent the union.
The courage it takes to strike for better treatment in the workplace is profound.
Alexandria and Team AOC stand in solidarity with the Writers Guild of America.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

* * *
1 - [_The Nation_](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18229?t=5&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230506?refcode=em20230506-4280-P_ORG_EXP_LAB&t=6&refcode2=4280_2526796_9Z5E-m&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230506-4280-P_ORG_EXP_LAB&t=7&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=4280%2E2526796%2E9Z5E-m)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

body:
In 2022, no one gave my husband, Adam Frisch, a chance against Lauren Boebert.

| Fight for Progress has raised over $300,000 for Democratic candidates. If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so _[here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62914855/404947086/838935893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliOTNkZTMxLTNjZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2Ap4dk82o1M8J0CxXxiTi4wKEBMU7ihadN01A9FNOHw=&emci=cf081e2b-3cec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9b93de31-3cec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22408598#candidate-inner)_ And of course, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/z4lkEUrOvESaGxr1QVEGJw2?unsubscribedata=dAvlmUbirEKcSwYfxzl3ybXO64VSLYcT3dt9iFMk1w%2BZVQkSSKADO2HI8VnF72nLr1EPROLAZxVvNTCLd7VoaYw5dYrR9%2Fz5AE0SfqTj18Y4w%2B8%2B%2BGbg8q%2FhPYJn179w3jW%2BSjWu%2BB%2F%2BB0%2FlPKQHWMtZgz4aan7KnFtJDQCVdagI0nG6mXB09kJuE7NNqSnUmMDrJyMHNHc%2F%2Fl1zZFYr8imX%2F%2BhkstGpb7JMQKtXzugKtGec%2Ftkb%2BwEYCgtvOdmpOAYGzGXSUm8cUPueEU4ZcK45%2BKy32wukplFnpZu95BfGu7FJRQyPAPnxLlr9CK7rjlCFmQhATmaPt9bZ66Utt1oLJpPNxhhEgQ5d5zYwprqw2LsVnkt2sKUR9t%2B%2B8dIqTLIRFHIFSkjpnJ9p2W9yTCj115f3hp%2FUvfK9AaKBuPI%3D) at any time.
---
| Peter,

In 2022, no one gave my husband, Adam Frisch, a chance against Lauren Boebert.

Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.”

Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62914856/404947087/2053616000?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230505-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliOTNkZTMxLTNjZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2Ap4dk82o1M8J0CxXxiTi4wKEBMU7ihadN01A9FNOHw=)
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**

Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened.

Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you?**

[_**Please, if you can afford to, will you split a donation right now between Adam’s campaign and Fight For Progress to help him defeat Lauren Boebert? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. Whatever you can afford to give today will help us invest early and win.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62914857/404947088/2053616000?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230505-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliOTNkZTMxLTNjZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2Ap4dk82o1M8J0CxXxiTi4wKEBMU7ihadN01A9FNOHw=)

This is a journey we’re making again because so many people like you reached out and encouraged Adam to run one more time.

I know it means a lot to Adam that you have his back.

Thank you,

Katy

clean_body: In 2022, no one gave my husband, Adam Frisch, a chance against Lauren Boebert. | Fight for Progress has raised over $300,000 for Democratic candidates. If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so And of course, you can at any time. | Peter, In 2022, no one gave my husband, Adam Frisch, a chance against Lauren Boebert. Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.” Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! = In the end, though, the race went to a recount. Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country. Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened. Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you? = This is a journey we’re making again because so many people like you reached out and encouraged Adam to run one more time. I know it means a lot to Adam that you have his back. Thank you, Katy * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. **Here’s what you need to know about New Hampshire’s far-right Republican candidate David Narkunas:** → He has claimed that pedophiles are masquerading as educators and that our teachers must be punished.
→ He is a proud member of the John Birch Society – a right-wing political group that is associated with preaching radical, extreme ideologies.
→ He has even claimed there is a conspiracy to not educate Americans to make them dependent on the government. **If we lose,** Republicans will gain ground and push their extreme agenda in the legislature – _and the people of the Granite State could be in danger._ **If we win,** Democrats will have a better chance at flipping the New Hampshire House and breaking another Republican trifecta. clean_body: In less than two weeks, state Democrats are facing a must-win special election in the New Hampshire House. Here’s what you need to know: | | | | | In less than two weeks, Democrats in New Hampshire are up against a right-wing conspiracy theorist in a special election in the state House. This race could make or break our chances of winning the chamber in November, so we need you to step up before it’s too late – Here’s what you need to know about New Hampshire’s far-right Republican candidate David Narkunas: → He has claimed that pedophiles are masquerading as educators and that our teachers must be punished. → He is a proud member of the John Birch Society – a right-wing political group that is associated with preaching radical, extreme ideologies. → He has even claimed there is a conspiracy to not educate Americans to make them dependent on the government. If we lose, Republicans will gain ground and push their extreme agenda in the legislature – and the people of the Granite State could be in danger. If we win, Democrats will have a better chance at flipping the New Hampshire House and breaking another Republican trifecta. But we need your help: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We wouldn’t ask if your support wasn’t critical to our success. Grassroots donations recently helped elect another Democrat to the New Hampshire House – without grassroots contributions, we may have lost. We know we can replicate February’s victory in New Hampshire again, but we need you on our side. So what do you say? Peter, Tuesday’s municipal primaries showed the strength and diversity of our party. From Lake Michigan to the Ohio River, Hoosier Democrats came out to vote in important contests for mayor, city and town councils and more. And the results reflect the diversity of our party. Across the state, we have fresh new faces ready to lead their communities into the next four years. [_**To win they’ll need all of us to work together. Chip in today to help elect more Hoosier Democrats this fall.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62915535/404947378/405560545?refcode=230501-Eday&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ0ZTJiOC0zY2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDZYYCyZ-dtHk22_ur8OtnKIcyvWC2wlDf7se3gdeFE=) Here’s a look at some of our first-time nominees around the state: Councilwoman Angie Nelson-Deuitch is running to flip Michigan City back to the Democratic column. She is in the race to “[prepare and strengthen](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62915536/404947379/-325888327?refcode=230506-PrimaryWins&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ0ZTJiOC0zY2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDZYYCyZ-dtHk22_ur8OtnKIcyvWC2wlDf7se3gdeFE=&emci=f29c9e3b-c6eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ef44e2b8-3cec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Michigan City’s families, students, and businesses for the opportunities ahead.” In 2019, Miles Nelson became the first Democrat ever elected in the City of Carmel. Now, [he’s looking to](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62915537/404947380/897112512?refcode=230506-PrimaryWins&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ0ZTJiOC0zY2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDZYYCyZ-dtHk22_ur8OtnKIcyvWC2wlDf7se3gdeFE=&emci=f29c9e3b-c6eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ef44e2b8-3cec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) keep Carmel moving forward and ensure it remains one of the best places to live, work, and raise a family. Veteran and first-time candidate Brandon Sakbun is the Democratic nominee for mayor of Terre Haute. He’s run a positive campaign [focused on](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62915538/404947381/794463599?refcode=230506-PrimaryWins&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ0ZTJiOC0zY2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDZYYCyZ-dtHk22_ur8OtnKIcyvWC2wlDf7se3gdeFE=&emci=f29c9e3b-c6eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ef44e2b8-3cec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) infrastructure funding and improving services for all in the city. [_**Show you stand with these first-time mayoral nominees and chip in to create a brighter future for Hoosier cities.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62915539/404947382/405560545?refcode=230501-Eday&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ0ZTJiOC0zY2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDZYYCyZ-dtHk22_ur8OtnKIcyvWC2wlDf7se3gdeFE=) _****_ State Senator Eddie Melton is the nominee for mayor of Gary. As Senator, Eddie focused on bringing more resources to Gary. As mayor, [his focus](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62915540/404947383/656562205?refcode=230506-PrimaryWins&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ0ZTJiOC0zY2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDZYYCyZ-dtHk22_ur8OtnKIcyvWC2wlDf7se3gdeFE=&emci=f29c9e3b-c6eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ef44e2b8-3cec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) will be on seizing opportunities to improve the city for families, workers, and children. Deb Whitfield is running to be the next mayor of Lawrence in northeast Marion County. Deb is a Lawrence City Councilwoman and [is running](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62915541/404947384/-1314089436?refcode=230506-PrimaryWins&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ0ZTJiOC0zY2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDZYYCyZ-dtHk22_ur8OtnKIcyvWC2wlDf7se3gdeFE=&emci=f29c9e3b-c6eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ef44e2b8-3cec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) to have a local focus on local issues and bring people together. Throughout her career, Stephanie Terry has been about making Evansville better. Now, she’s the [Democratic nominee for mayor ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62915542/404947385/-1236158323?refcode=230506-PrimaryWins&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ0ZTJiOC0zY2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDZYYCyZ-dtHk22_ur8OtnKIcyvWC2wlDf7se3gdeFE=&emci=f29c9e3b-c6eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ef44e2b8-3cec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)and looking to give back to the city that is her longtime home by improving city services and uplifting residents. Erin Easter is the Democratic nominee for mayor in West Lafayette and has a servant’s heart. She’s spent years making Great Lafayette better serving in the Chamber, and is [running for mayor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62915543/404947386/1069509294?refcode=230506-PrimaryWins&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ0ZTJiOC0zY2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDZYYCyZ-dtHk22_ur8OtnKIcyvWC2wlDf7se3gdeFE=&emci=f29c9e3b-c6eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ef44e2b8-3cec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) to increase quality of place and create exceptional neighborhoods. Kerry Thomson won the Democratic nomination for mayor in Bloomington. As mayor, [she’s focused on](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62915544/404947387/-1876316588?refcode=230506-PrimaryWins&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ0ZTJiOC0zY2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDZYYCyZ-dtHk22_ur8OtnKIcyvWC2wlDf7se3gdeFE=&emci=f29c9e3b-c6eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ef44e2b8-3cec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) listening to all voices in the community, creating more housing opportunities and moving Bloomington forward. [_**We have a tremendous opportunity to make change throughout Indiana with this amazing slate of first-time mayoral nominees. Show your support and let’s deliver results for Hoosier communities.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62915545/404947388/405560545?refcode=230501-Eday&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ0ZTJiOC0zY2VjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDZYYCyZ-dtHk22_ur8OtnKIcyvWC2wlDf7se3gdeFE=) Thanks,
Indiana Democratic Party

Throughout her career, Stephanie Terry has been about making Evansville better. Now, she’s the looking to give back to the city that is her longtime home by improving city services and uplifting residents. Erin Easter is the Democratic nominee for mayor in West Lafayette and has a servant’s heart. She’s spent years making Great Lafayette better serving in the Chamber, and is to increase quality of place and create exceptional neighborhoods. Kerry Thomson won the Democratic nomination for mayor in Bloomington. As mayor, listening to all voices in the community, creating more housing opportunities and moving Bloomington forward. = Thanks, Indiana Democratic Party | | | = | = [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org.
