name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Town Hall: End Medical Debt launch w/ Ro Khanna, patient advocates, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

TOPICS: Bernie to Reintroduce M4A | Freedom from Medical Debt Campaign
Launch | Ro Khanna Joins Patient Advocates | New Med Debt Action
Team | Share Your Story! | Medical Debt & M4A Stickers | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1011&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ][IMG]

Don’t miss our big campaign launch! RSVP now for our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]LIVE Freedom from
Medical Debt Town Hall with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our patient advocates —
this Monday, May 8th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

We’ll also talk to Berneta Haynes of the National Consumer Law Center to
dig into the systemic solutions that Congress and the White House have the
power to enact right now.

Join us to hear stories from brave patients and OR members speaking out,
and strategize with us to take on price-gouging hospitals, predatory debt
collectors, and others who perpetuate this sick system.

We are organizing an outside coalition to work with Bernie Sanders, Ro
Khanna, and other allies in the fight for Medicare for All and declare
Freedom from Medical Debt.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

The Problem: American hospitals price-gouge patients, fail to inform them
about financial aid options, and then when they can’t pay the exorbitant
bills, resort to predatory collections practices.

Medical debt forces many Americans to cut back on food and put their life
on credit cards. It’s the #1 cause of bankruptcy, but it doesn’t just
drain bank accounts. Lives are cut short when people put off care for fear
of debt.

Here are just some of the root-cause solutions our coalition is organizing
for on the ground and inside the halls of power:
— End patient price-gouging
— Guarantee the right to free care and financial assistance
— Stop predatory collections practices

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1014&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]JOIN THE TOWNHALL

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1015&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ][IMG]

As Bernie Sanders and US Rep. Pramila Jayapal prepare to reintroduce
Medicare for All in Congress, we are organizing people struggling with
medical debt to speak up and fight for health care justice.

Sign up to be part of our growing team organizing to declare Freedom from
Medical Debt and advance the fight for Medicare for All.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8647?t=1016&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]JOIN THE MEDICAL DEBT TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8648?t=1017&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ][IMG]

Help fund our work as we organize a powerful coalition to take on
price-gouging hospitals, predatory debt collectors and more!

Pitch in $10 or sign up with a recurring donation of at least $5 to get
both of these new stickers. Current monthly members get it 2-for-1 with a
one-time gift of $5!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8648?t=1018&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]GET YOUR STICKERS!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1019&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ][IMG]

Our Revolution is waging a national campaign to end medical debt with
patient advocates and progressive leaders like Bernie and Ro Khanna - and
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1020&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]we want to hear from you!

Do you owe money for medical care that you couldn’t afford? Have you put
life expenses on a credit card in order to pay medical bills? Share your
story!

Join the hundreds speaking out through our survey. Our goal is to feature
voices from every congressional district in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1021&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]TELL YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1022&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ][IMG]

Here’s what some of our patient advocates have said:

“I’m 72 and now live with my daughter after losing everything because of
medical bills. I had $250K saved up for retirement and then disaster hit -
several bouts of cancer and a stroke in 2009.” - D’Anne M., AZ

“In 2010, I was hit by a car on my bike. I barely survived, had a brain
injury, my hand amputated and reattached — costing nearly $1 million. Even
with insurance, some of that went on credit cards. Now, instead of paying
it down, I’m incurring more costs for pain treatments that aren’t covered.
It’s a vicious cycle.” - Kristin N., Washington

“I wouldn't owe anything if hospitals didn't gouge patients. The cost of
an MRI in the hospital was 8x the cost of an outpatient MRI and 80x
outsourced MRIs. I owe over $8000.” - Mary W., Texas

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1023&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]SHARE YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1024&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution-endorsed Carlos Perkins is headed to the Indianapolis City
Council after a grassroots campaign of knocking doors and connecting with
voters on issues of public safety, mental healthcare, good living wage
jobs, and environmental justice.

Carlos adds to the number of mayors we’re electing to build local
progressive power in cities across the country. Last month, we put Brandon
Johnson at the helm in Chicago and next we plan to elect Helen Gym as
Mayor of Philadelphia!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1025&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]SIGN UP FOR OUR CALL TEAM

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1026&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ][IMG]

Sign up to join our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1027&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]LIVE Freedom from Medical Debt Town Hall with US
Rep. Ro Khanna and Our Revolution patient advocates — LIVE on Zoom this
Monday, May 8th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

We’ll be strategizing for systemic solutions to take on price-gouging
hospitals, predatory debt collectors, and others standing in the way of
Medicare for All and Freedom from Medical Debt.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1028&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

We are investing our resources to go up against powerful forces opposing
health care justice, and need your help!

Pitch in $10 or sign up with a recurring donation of at least $5 to get
both of these stickers showing our support for Medicare for All and
Freedom from Medical Debt. If you’re already a member, get your stickers
with a one-time donation of just $5!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8648?t=1029&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]GET YOUR STICKERS

★ ★ ★

Special guests Susan Sarandon and Ana Maria Archila will join us for a
major action in Albany on Monday calling for New York State to raise the
wage and end subminimum wages for tipped workers.

We now have 33 cosponsors in the NY Assembly, and it’s time for the Empire
State to step up to the plate. Join us at 11:30 am May 8th in Albany —
we’ve got a bus traveling from NYC for folks who need a ride!

“NY is our biggest fight,” OFW President Saru Jayaraman said. “Our big
action is set for May 8th with lots of great moms and me getting arrested
in the state capitol in advance of Mother’s Day.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8628?t=1030&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]JOIN US IN ALBANY

★ ★ ★

WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230506_NL_MondayInvite_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MondayCall.KVBpjY&t=1007&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230506_NL_MondayInvite_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MondayCall.t5nGnz&t=1008&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230506_NL_MondayInvite_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MondayCall.zJpJFP&t=1009&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230506_NL_MondayInvite_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MondayCall.OHVLfq&t=1010&akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4251%2E5885482%2EhjT1Jh

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

After he was caught VIOLATING financial disclosure rules, some House Democrats are demanding he be REMOVED from the Supreme Court.

**_But public opinion shows some Americans — even some Democrats — still approve of Thomas despite his far-right corruption!_** [**So we need to know:**
**Do you approve of Clarence Thomas?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/thomas-approval/?source=VPP_20230506_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=7539%2E878179%2EIk4O6q) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/thomas-approval/?source=VPP_20230506_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=7539%2E878179%2EIk4O6q) | [NO WAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/thomas-approval/?source=VPP_20230506_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=7539%2E878179%2EIk4O6q)

MAGA Justice Clarence Thomas needs to GO. He:

❌ Covered up his wife’s attempt to OVERTURN President Biden’s 2020 victory ❌
❌ Accepted luxury trips and BRIBES from a GOP mega donor ❌
❌ **Plotting to implement a nationwide BAN on abortion medication** ❌

_**So, as one of our TOP 150 local Democrats, we need your input on crooked Clarence Thomas! Answer before MIDNIGHT:**_

name: Joe Biden
subject: From the very start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:

subject: It’s time for Republicans to stop holding our economy hostage.

body:
Listen, it is beyond irresponsible for McCarthy and the GOP to hold the American economy hostage to these extremist demands.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62917186/404950925/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDc2MDQ0NC00NGVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bxH-OAF3yI3Si18ueKK_bRYUuzzCoVmxEqkgMz7L_F4=&emci=2f731a75-a8ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9d760444-44ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364) **** Team — Kevin McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and their fellow GOP extremists are continuing to demand draconian cuts to food stamps, Medicaid, and environmental programs in exchange for paying bills _that our nation has already incurred._ Independent experts say this bill — in addition to preventing the most vulnerable Americans from getting enough food to eat — would likely cost hundreds of thousands of Americans jobs and spark a recession. **Listen, it is beyond irresponsible for McCarthy and the GOP to hold the American economy hostage to these extremist demands.** [**That’s why I’m saying loud and clear that Congress needs to pass a clean debt ceiling increase immediately and stop playing these ridiculous games. And I’m counting on you to join my call for action. Will you please sign your name next to mine?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62917187/404950926/-471117148?refcode=email_050623_debtceilingpetition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDc2MDQ0NC00NGVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bxH-OAF3yI3Si18ueKK_bRYUuzzCoVmxEqkgMz7L_F4=&emci=2f731a75-a8ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9d760444-44ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364) | | [ADD YOUR NAME → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62917188/404950927/-471117148?refcode=email_050623_debtceilingpetition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDc2MDQ0NC00NGVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bxH-OAF3yI3Si18ueKK_bRYUuzzCoVmxEqkgMz7L_F4=&emci=2f731a75-a8ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9d760444-44ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)

Now is the time for all of us to raise our voices and take a stand against these reckless far-right antics — because they are putting every single American family at risk.
Thank you for everything you do, Team.
Brittany Pettersen
_Congresswoman, Colorado’s 7th District_

name: Dr. Kim Schrier For Congress
subject: McCarthy’s dangerous debt ceiling plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Speaker McCarthy is refusing to raise the debt ceiling unless we make draconian cuts to essential programs. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62917216/404951013/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWIzZWI2Ny00NGVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IdEg09yiQad5SacVYDAXeUF9On4Pkq2HcPIdiDEXGlc=&emci=b6ddd1ba-6beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=61b3eb67-44ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

According to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen, our nation could default on our debt as soon as June 1 if Congress doesn't act.

The consequences of defaulting on our debt are substantial. Moody's just released a report showing a default could result in the loss of over seven million jobs and create a financial crisis.

But instead of raising the debt ceiling – like Republicans voted to do three times during the Trump administration – **Speaker Kevin McCarthy is holding our economy hostage. He's refusing to raise the debt ceiling unless we make draconian cuts to essential programs.**

McCarthy's proposed bill would eliminate more than 81,000 U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs jobs that service our veterans. In addition to slashing the VA, McCarthy's plan includes major cuts to education and health care. That's unacceptable.

Kim voted against Kevin McCarthy's reckless brinkmanship, but she wants to know what you think:

clean_body: Speaker McCarthy is refusing to raise the debt ceiling unless we make draconian cuts to essential programs. Peter, According to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen, our nation could default on our debt as soon as June 1 if Congress doesn't act. The consequences of defaulting on our debt are substantial. Moody's just released a report showing a default could result in the loss of over seven million jobs and create a financial crisis. But instead of raising the debt ceiling – like Republicans voted to do three times during the Trump administration – Speaker Kevin McCarthy is holding our economy hostage. He's refusing to raise the debt ceiling unless we make draconian cuts to essential programs. McCarthy's proposed bill would eliminate more than 81,000 U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs jobs that service our veterans. In addition to slashing the VA, McCarthy's plan includes major cuts to education and health care. That's unacceptable. Kim voted against Kevin McCarthy's reckless brinkmanship, but she wants to know what you think: | | Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. But here’s the difference, team: My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. It’s built by hard-working folks like you. Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves. And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. And it all starts with $1. clean_body: The Republican clown car is... very full. | = | Peter, It seems like every week there’s a new Republican jumping in to run for President (and even more rumors about who’s thinking about it). No matter who ends up going against President Biden, one thing we know for sure is it’s going to have major ramifications down ballot in our race. So, we wanted to get your thoughts - who do you think will get the GOP nomination? Is Trump going to run away with it? Will Ron DeSantis jump in and rally social conservatives? The truth is no matter which of these candidates becomes the Republican nominee, it’s going to be up to us to defeat them and take back the House. Our democracy depends on it. Thanks for sharing your thoughts, \- Team Harder

name: Team Swalwell
subject: I’m *still* paying off my student loans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
And I’m one of the lucky ones. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62917949/404957159/253275352?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODM1ZTE2MS00YmVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uWwAg4vRzyg_ieYz69wt390zPubyOvX8oX0omHmfWiU=)
Friend, I’ve been out of school for almost 20 years, but do you know the one piece of my education that’s stuck with me _to date?_ If your answer was **five figures worth of student loans that I’m _still_ paying off**, then _ding, ding, ding!_ You’d be correct. I know I’m not alone in this, either. _**Millions**_ of Americans are saddled with sky-high student loan payments. Under President Biden’s student debt relief plan, which would forgive up to $20,000 in student loans, working families would have a light at the end of the never-ending tunnel of payments. **But now, President Biden’s plan to tackle student loan debt is tied up in the Supreme Court, and if they rule against Biden’s plan before June 30, borrowers with remaining balances will need to start repaying the loans 60 days after the Court’s decision.** _That also means interest rates will start up again, too._ Let me be clear: No matter the Supreme Court’s ruling, I _will_ fight to give borrowers across the country federal support by eliminating federal interest rates and expanding our Pell Grant opportunities. **Receiving a higher education shouldn’t mean signing your income away _decades_ after you’ve walked the stage. clean_body: And I’m one of the lucky ones. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Friend, I’ve been out of school for almost 20 years, but do you know the one piece of my education that’s stuck with me to date? If your answer was five figures worth of student loans that I’m still paying off, then ding, ding, ding! You’d be correct. I know I’m not alone in this, either. Millions of Americans are saddled with sky-high student loan payments. Under President Biden’s student debt relief plan, which would forgive up to $20,000 in student loans, working families would have a light at the end of the never-ending tunnel of payments. But now, President Biden’s plan to tackle student loan debt is tied up in the Supreme Court, and if they rule against Biden’s plan before June 30, borrowers with remaining balances will need to start repaying the loans 60 days after the Court’s decision. That also means interest rates will start up again, too. Let me be clear: No matter the Supreme Court’s ruling, I will fight to give borrowers across the country federal support by eliminating federal interest rates and expanding our Pell Grant opportunities. Receiving a higher education shouldn’t mean signing your income away decades after you’ve walked the stage. | — Eric Swalwell | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. body:
A momentum of historical legislative accomplishments! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/46f9c45c866a/n41kepo7ku-480957?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=e45d2b87d5&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
|
* Legislative Update for Week Ending May 5, 2023
* Lincoln Elections
* Appropriations
* Education Bill
* Protecting the Constitution and Preventing Big Government
* State Board of Education Desiring More Secrecy
* Senator Hunt Leaves the Democrat Party

---
|
---
|
## Legislative Update for Week Ending May 5, 2023
---
| It was a busy political week in Nebraska. The Election in Lincoln, the budget discussions, followed by a departure from the Democratic Party for one of the filibuster members dominated the landscape. This week’s ‘long form’ topic will be on the Lincoln elections. We believe there are several key takeaways that need to be disseminated so that our citizens can improve their local results and local elections. Furthermore, we believe the revelations in the Lincoln elections will help illustrate the need for legal change in our state. There are three pages devoted to this topic. The remainder of the letter will be focused on brief summaries of what is happening at the state legislature to keep you “in tune” to what is going on. Follow the links to the topic of interest.

Let’s dig in.....
---
|
## Lincoln Elections
---
| On Tuesday we saw the results of the Lincoln elections and they were disappointing. Although we had three Republicans elected; one for City Council and both Airport Authority candidates, the race for Mayor, school board, and other city council spots did not go our way. The election results bring clarity to the amazing work done at the Precinct level, but also the areas that need improvement. At the March SCC meeting in Gering, I gave a perspective of where Republican elections were headed and what we need to focus on (fixing the laws and legal ballot acquisition). This message still stands.

To begin with, the final outcome in voter percentage terms was interestingly and seemingly identical to the voter percentage in 2019 and 2015. To many who do not live and breathe election cycles, it could be assumed that nothing changed and nothing was achieved since the percentages were roughly the same the last 8 years. We must remember that the Lincoln municipality elections occur during the off-year (non-Federal or State race) and thus provide valuable insights. So, the first observation is participation was way up, over 46% of Lincolnites turned in a ballot (we purposely use the term “turned in a ballot” versus “voted”). This was record voter turnout for a Lincoln mayoral general election. The Republican vote was much stronger than in the past. Yet, we believe an election for Mayor should still be stronger than a 46% participation rate despite this level being a record.

Secondly, the multilayered approach to the candidates and campaigns are what is necessary to gain ground and win elections in “Purple” cities. Because of the Neighborhood Captain program, the slate card effort by the county, a complete set of candidates for EVERY position, and the money spent in the mayoral campaign on ads...all paid dividends for turnout. In 2015, 30% of registered voters had cast a vote. In 2019, 36.8% of voters had cast a vote. In 2023, 46.1% of registered voters had a vote recorded on their ballot. In the last four years, there was only an increase of 4.6% of registered voters. Amazingly, this year Republicans had over 31% more ballots turned in than they did in 2019 (the last mayoral general election). The Get-out-the-Vote effort executed by the party and campaign was substantial. LCRP knocked over 30k doors in the last week alone. Most of our volunteers are ready to go knock again with a few tweaks in the strategy. However, for those that felt deflated by the outcome, let the facts encourage you that the battle must be continued as YOUR efforts were effective in driving votes. We are further along than ever before but some areas of improvement still need to occur. One of the solutions that needs to happen is for state lawmakers to take the issue of election integrity more seriously. We will not be discussing messaging in this piece as the candidates will usually drive the messaging they want to deliver with their campaigns. We will narrow our focus in this piece to ballot analysis.

_**Why did we lose?**_

The simple answer is early voting. Early voting conjunctively points to the issues of election integrity and early ballot acquisition. Some voters trust the elections and others do not. Only recently do we have a qualification of what voters want for verification in elections when they passed the Photo Voter ID initiative last year with 65.45% in FAVOR. Voters were clear that they understand the photo identity component of BECOMING a registered voter, BUT the citizens of Nebraska want a Photo present when CASTING a ballot. Let’s examine the facts and you can draw your own conclusion if we have voting problems. Spoiler alert...we need to execute a duel strategy to cover BOTH arguments.

‘COVID changed the game’ was a widespread narrative on why voting by mail was here to stay. Unfortunately, the numbers don’t bear that fact out with Republicans. The numbers do bear that fact out with Democrats (if you are one that trusts the process). The question for you is simple: Do different sets of political people conclude they like to vote differently after COVID? The Republicans clearly didn’t adopt a vote by mail posture, Democrats did.

For Election Day voting, the Republican voter turnout grew by 22.8% from 2019 to 2023. The Republicans were motivated to go out and vote in-person. Coincidentally, the vote count for Democrats on Election Day actually FELL by almost 6%. The Democrats were not as motivated for whatever reason to go in-person to the polls. Who are these seemingly different sets of voters? Surely, there are people of all walks of life on both sides from truck drivers, office assistants, lawyers, doctors, teachers, CEO’s, students, etc?

Where the game was won for the Democrats was “early voting”. To be clear, this is not an absentee ballot or an overseas member. The number of early votes for Democrats increased by 107% in ONE Mayor election cycle (2019 to 2023)! Statistically, this is quite the anomaly to achieve in one cycle. When we look at the numbers, early voting for the Republican candidate went from 30% to 33.9% of their total vote. Meanwhile, Democrat Baird went from 32.3% of her total vote in 2019 early voting to over 50% (50.7%) of her total vote. Again, a growth of 107% in early votes in one cycle is amazing and is why questions are being asked. The early vote won the day for the Democrats, while the game day vote speaks to a lack of energy for their campaigns or a clear shift in how the Democrats voted.

_**Where do we go from here? **_

One, we believe the election laws must be changed, starting with the REQUIRED Photo Voter ID law AND ENFORCED. Second, the party in conjunction with our campaign consultants and candidates, need a much stronger LEGAL ballot acquisition strategy.

In Lancaster we led the effort to eliminate unattended drop boxes and Zuckerberg dollars in past elections. We saw improvement the very next election cycle. Furthermore, the legislature was presented a myriad of strong election integrity bills this year. The desire to implement and adopt the NEGOP Legislative Plan’s on Election Security is simply not there. The NEGOP Election Integrity committee worked diligently to prepare strong and solid legislation, however these bills are not prioritized at the legislative leadership level. The topic is extremely complex. Unfortunately many government leaders do not try to understand the problem or do not have the will to stand against the desires of those running our elections. We must educate and then create the action. If we can package healthcare, education, and economic bills...we should be able to put a package of election integrity bills together. More disappointing, a VOTER ID bill should have been done by now and would HAVE CLEARLY made a difference in the Lincoln elections. The Voter ID amendment language is clear; the qualified voter must present their photo ID when casting (depositing in the box with chain of custody controls) their ballot. Frankly, we don’t see how mail-in voting is possible when reading the constitutional amendment. Again, we didn’t write the amendment, but we will seek to uphold the constitution. Handing your ballot to the postman breaks the chain of custody and does not meet the definition of “Casting” (Officially Depositing one’s ballot). ‘Mail-in’ does not observe the requirement of the qualified voter (the REGISTERED voter, versus someone else) presenting the photo ID before depositing the ballot in the box. We don’t see mail-in voting as a viable legal option when you read the amendment. The reality is that our election officials, many in our public, and the clerks have a fear of changing. Nonetheless, many Republicans see Nebraska Constitutional issues with what they are trying to preserve.

We have serious questions about the quality of the early vote in this election. The Attorney General of Texas just gave a robust discussion on election fraud that is occurring. He doesn’t sugar coat with a message of “Election Integrity”. He calls out “Election Fraud” and doesn’t mince words. The AG of Texas stated last week, “I can talk about voting machines and all kinds of different ways that election fraud occurs, but the one that I know happens very significantly, at least in my state, (and) I think across the country, is mail-in ballots”. You can watch the entire AG conference on Election Fraud and his concerns on mail in ballots on April 27th [**HERE**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=297480aae3&e=25844e23a8)...

Next, we need your donations. The party will need to undertake intense action into a LEGAL ballot acquisition strategy if our state government is not going to change the laws and make our elections more secure. Second, we need your phone calls to government officials. The delay of Voter ID was damaging. The will to not take up election integrity discussions is out of touch with the rest of Republicans around the state and country. We need some intense focus on this issue. I’m currently in search for the right people to help this party win on game day by playing to the letter of the law with these poor election laws in place.

In the meantime, we want to encourage our new massive number of volunteers across the state. We see the fruits of these efforts in their attempts to change the state. The effort for Lincoln was outstanding. We will need volunteers again. The work DOES pay dividends. However, before we make the next ask for election help, we need a change in the laws and some significant tweeks in our LEGAL ballot acquisition strategy at a party and in our campaigns run by consultants. The effort that was displayed in the citizens will win when we have a proper legal environment and a consulting class/party that moves some of the energy from messaging to legal ballot acquisition.

Last but not least, don’t listen to the media, democrats, and non conservatives that our message is off. Suzanne Geist delivered a strong message for law and order, roads, and tax relief at our local level. These are still winning issues. Suzanne was educated and articulate as to what should be the priorities of a Mayor. Early voting law and legal ballot acquisition is the primary problem that needs focus.
---
|
---
|
## Appropriations
---
| Where the additional revenues brought into the state of Nebraska will be spent had intense debate this week on the floor. A vote on the budget passed the first round of the legislative process. The budget will show about a 2.3% increase in spending per year. The areas of heavy discussion for surplus deployment were tax relief, water projects (including the Perkins Canal), and a new state prison. Numerous discussions were had on why state departments are not following through with studies outlined by them from the legislature in spending discussion. This noncompliance with doing the studies comes with multiple citations of failing audits. State agencies continue to experience heavy fire in floor debates this session and the legislature is looking at flexing their might a little more as it is clear the state departments have grown lax in responding to the legislative branch and warnings from the auditor.

We thought Unicameral Update did a nice job summarizing many of the new expenditures. **[HERE](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7f0c227535&e=25844e23a8)** is a link to their thorough article that provides more detail on the expenditure changes that are in the spending package that cleared the first round.
---
|
---
|
## Education Bill
---
| Over 22 bills were combined into one single bill that passed this week. The filibuster continues to force monstrous bills to be created. This education bill primarily allocated lottery funds to different areas of emphasis originally brought in the 22 different bills. Teachers, discipline, educational assistance and more were addressed in this bill. Again, we feel like Unicameral Update did a nice job summarizing what was covered in this bill. Read [HERE](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=dab1623a66&e=25844e23a8) for more details...
---
|
---
|
## Protecting the Constitution and Preventing Big Government
---
| We wanted to reemphasize a point that we made in a prior newsletter. The conduct of this session, we believe, will have long-term damaging consequences to this state in terms of creating an environment for big government. These mammoth bills that combine 20 or more bills give something to many senators if they vote “Yes”. By the very nature of a politician, they want to go back to their district and say, “Hey! Look what I got for you!” will be the default position for the majority as it is in DC. This is how spending became out of control...an annual massive Omnibus bill in DC. Every representative got some goodie to go home with and say, “I won something for my district”.

Our Nebraska Constitution is very clear, Article III; Clause 14 states, “No bill shall contain more than one subject, and the subject shall be clearly expressed in the title.” The legislature has amended bills for years. This is nothing new. However, the bills this year have been unprecedented by combining many different bills into one ginormous bill. The title of the bill would have to be the longest run on sentence in world history when you have 24 bills combined into one title to be constitutionally compliant. The main argument for these combined bills is the “Subject” IS the same whether that be healthcare, education, etc. However, if you read some of these bills you understand that the subject matter is quite different and why they were originally written into separate bills at the beginning of the session. We believe single issue bills are critical for the long term. We believe in our Platform when it indicates Less Government is best. Less law will be passed with single issue bills and less government will be created, which helps everyone on main street live freer lives. Only the bills with broad consensus will move forward in a single issue environment. We need rules for less bills, less obstruction, and smaller government. It may be time to revisit what the word “One Subject” means in the Constitution. While we would likely lose in court that education is not “One Subject”, it would appear the intent of one subject would not lead to combining 24 separate bills with their own titles into one bill with one title to move things forward.
---
|
---
|
## State Board of Education Desiring More Secrecy
---
| The NEGOP continues to focus on education and helping parents know what the State Board of Education is deciding for their children. Lauren Wagner, an education reporter for the Omaha World Herald, tweeted the following while covering the latest State Board of Education meeting, “Patti Gubbels, board president, is giving her report. She’s talking about transparency & how board members have to realize what to share publicly & what not to share. She said some transparency is toxic & has unintended consequences.” We disagree. The NEGOP firmly believes a policy of non transparency with the public has been a big problem of this board in the past. We will continue to seek candidates that are transparent with their constituents on the topics being covered by the board for the benefit of the child and parent to make informed decisions.
---
|
## Senator Hunt Leaves the Democrat Party
---
| Senator Hunt does not think the party and the state is “Left” enough. Therefore, she is leaving. She feels the Democrat party is not doing enough in her mind to combat the “extremists on the right” (her words) on abortion and transgender care. Frustration for her with Sen Albrecht’s and Sen Kauth’s legislation on abortion and stopping sex changes for minors have been a consistent focus for her anger. The Democrats have continually rotated between Hunt, the Cavanaughs, and Conrad for party messaging. It will be interesting to see if party messaging includes Hunt as a mouthpiece going forward.

Until next week....
---
| Todd Watson
Political Director
NEGOP
---

I’m currently in search for the right people to help this party win on game day by playing to the letter of the law with these poor election laws in place. In the meantime, we want to encourage our new massive number of volunteers across the state. We see the fruits of these efforts in their attempts to change the state. The effort for Lincoln was outstanding. We will need volunteers again. The work DOES pay dividends. However, before we make the next ask for election help, we need a change in the laws and some significant tweeks in our LEGAL ballot acquisition strategy at a party and in our campaigns run by consultants. The effort that was displayed in the citizens will win when we have a proper legal environment and a consulting class/party that moves some of the energy from messaging to legal ballot acquisition. Last but not least, don’t listen to the media, democrats, and non conservatives that our message is off. Suzanne Geist delivered a strong message for law and order, roads, and tax relief at our local level. These are still winning issues. Suzanne was educated and articulate as to what should be the priorities of a Mayor. Early voting law and legal ballot acquisition is the primary problem that needs focus. | | Appropriations | Where the additional revenues brought into the state of Nebraska will be spent had intense debate this week on the floor. A vote on the budget passed the first round of the legislative process. The budget will show about a 2.3% increase in spending per year. The areas of heavy discussion for surplus deployment were tax relief, water projects (including the Perkins Canal), and a new state prison. Numerous discussions were had on why state departments are not following through with studies outlined by them from the legislature in spending discussion. This noncompliance with doing the studies comes with multiple citations of failing audits. State agencies continue to experience heavy fire in floor debates this session and the legislature is looking at flexing their might a little more as it is clear the state departments have grown lax in responding to the legislative branch and warnings from the auditor. We thought Unicameral Update did a nice job summarizing many of the new expenditures. is a link to their thorough article that provides more detail on the expenditure changes that are in the spending package that cleared the first round. | | Education Bill | Over 22 bills were combined into one single bill that passed this week. The filibuster continues to force monstrous bills to be created. This education bill primarily allocated lottery funds to different areas of emphasis originally brought in the 22 different bills. Teachers, discipline, educational assistance and more were addressed in this bill. Again, we feel like Unicameral Update did a nice job summarizing what was covered in this bill. Read for more details... | | Protecting the Constitution and Preventing Big Government | We wanted to reemphasize a point that we made in a prior newsletter. The conduct of this session, we believe, will have long-term damaging consequences to this state in terms of creating an environment for big government. These mammoth bills that combine 20 or more bills give something to many senators if they vote “Yes”. By the very nature of a politician, they want to go back to their district and say, “Hey! Look what I got for you!” will be the default position for the majority as it is in DC. This is how spending became out of control...an annual massive Omnibus bill in DC. Every representative got some goodie to go home with and say, “I won something for my district”. Our Nebraska Constitution is very clear, Article III; Clause 14 states, “No bill shall contain more than one subject, and the subject shall be clearly expressed in the title.” The legislature has amended bills for years. This is nothing new. However, the bills this year have been unprecedented by combining many different bills into one ginormous bill. The title of the bill would have to be the longest run on sentence in world history when you have 24 bills combined into one title to be constitutionally compliant. The main argument for these combined bills is the “Subject” IS the same whether that be healthcare, education, etc. However, if you read some of these bills you understand that the subject matter is quite different and why they were originally written into separate bills at the beginning of the session. We believe single issue bills are critical for the long term. We believe in our Platform when it indicates Less Government is best. Less law will be passed with single issue bills and less government will be created, which helps everyone on main street live freer lives. Only the bills with broad consensus will move forward in a single issue environment. We need rules for less bills, less obstruction, and smaller government. It may be time to revisit what the word “One Subject” means in the Constitution. While we would likely lose in court that education is not “One Subject”, it would appear the intent of one subject would not lead to combining 24 separate bills with their own titles into one bill with one title to move things forward. | | State Board of Education Desiring More Secrecy | The NEGOP continues to focus on education and helping parents know what the State Board of Education is deciding for their children. Lauren Wagner, an education reporter for the Omaha World Herald, tweeted the following while covering the latest State Board of Education meeting, “Patti Gubbels, board president, is giving her report. She’s talking about transparency & how board members have to realize what to share publicly & what not to share. She said some transparency is toxic & has unintended consequences.” We disagree. The NEGOP firmly believes a policy of non transparency with the public has been a big problem of this board in the past. We will continue to seek candidates that are transparent with their constituents on the topics being covered by the board for the benefit of the child and parent to make informed decisions. | Senator Hunt Leaves the Democrat Party | Senator Hunt does not think the party and the state is “Left” enough. Therefore, she is leaving. She feels the Democrat party is not doing enough in her mind to combat the “extremists on the right” (her words) on abortion and transgender care. Frustration for her with Sen Albrecht’s and Sen Kauth’s legislation on abortion and stopping sex changes for minors have been a consistent focus for her anger. The Democrats have continually rotated between Hunt, the Cavanaughs, and Conrad for party messaging. It will be interesting to see if party messaging includes Hunt as a mouthpiece going forward. Until next week.... | Todd Watson Political Director NEGOP | | | | | | | | | | | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved.

Derek, last week marked 100 days since Josh Shapiro was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s 48th Governor.

Derek, last week marked 100 days since Josh Shapiro was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s 48th Governor.

And in that short time, we’ve already accomplished so much. We’ve taken huge steps forward in ensuring every Pennsylvanian has the freedom to chart their own course and the opportunity to succeed.

But we’re just getting started, Derek. And as we continue to charge full speed ahead, we want to hear from you.

[**May 6, 1960:** The Civil Rights Act of 1960 was a federal law that aimed to enforce voting rights for African Americans in the United States. It was signed into law by President Eisenhower. While it did not have the full impact of later civil rights legislation, it was an important step toward the eventual passage of the Voting Rights Act of 1965.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e66b467064f44eaba13c019adceb0cdd&_e=9V8l-0GefzNanUrJsNxedEK4VhqzG-IUhMvmBUQKKkZroRpyE2jrTN7EncqT5Ghm-IyUJpApT7qfsi20rAx1G2SDD6rZYbOo5y-DQlyJ428XHOio6WufQ6aEm9I1vrIdWP1ZFNQlmBhyoV0x1ko47E5YKus77gM31ylCjBThOvenVJdXQtQF24P9XXreYCbdQU8AMIBkMLo84Rt4KbEZ_K3O-KkLSENGkEjWDzbw1zqkh0FWolvEAJ79RyMrxM7Hn0eSk8Ns2dKoUY09pYgHzQ5vJZUwNg0YCqFTQgJSG6lPWcFM9GWZcUM74nUfKEQNQWbE3MRQPDE1TGif3-bAaFiGtdjlvnyJR8U3V_DHMsaHSo_bW5s8b5jF0Z0gz6pNLe2SeyQE2h8hcexVeFEJ2A%3D%3D) **Source -[african-american-civil-rights.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e66b467064f44eaba13c019adceb0cdd&_e=9V8l-0GefzNanUrJsNxedEK4VhqzG-IUhMvmBUQKKkZroRpyE2jrTN7EncqT5Ghm-IyUJpApT7qfsi20rAx1G2SDD6rZYbOo5y-DQlyJ428XHOio6WufQ6aEm9I1vrIdWP1ZFNQlmBhyoV0x1ko47E5YKus77gM31ylCjBThOvenVJdXQtQF24P9XXreYCbdQU8AMIBkMLo84Rt4KbEZ_K3O-KkLSENGkEjWDzbw1zqvf_rUjltILM55IlRAUQ4pfBQUKfMi5Wp0c7JxwWpBs2NVGomxICT8Ge0f1gk_CIcC3sQF-Fo4GevPY0mxJ7bFRdFOa90nLSXuOVIktGudRJPzA2xtTbJcKeJcFwmgizAIIfX5tn41JbrjPwtKoev8l-0jDDo9VcusBAgFxPMBbg%3D%3D)**

[**May 6, 1998: **Steve Jobs proved his critics wrong and restored Apple's status as a tech icon when he introduced the iMac on May 6, 1998. [**May 6, 2002:** South African-born American entrepreneur Elon Musk founded SpaceX with the goal of revolutionizing the aerospace industry and democratizing spaceflight. The company's first rocket, the Falcon 1, was a two-stage, liquid-fueled spacecraft created to launch small satellites into orbit. By introducing a more cost-effective and efficient way to access space, SpaceX aimed at making affordable spaceflight a reality.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e66b467064f44eaba13c019adceb0cdd&_e=Qky9mvV7D-V4PvjYP5JCbRsQVRpGywEOlUSXv7_JpnwepVOIoJfqQSgltEuN2cxr8FAwbUfdP5Hba5tUTyLVO19IoJ4nC0KP4fbD1AFtw3JcPxMQyK4qYsJo7qQbc8rj_sL11ohjNXh6z3GjmyNQd4sqQG7VxGrx5Ac7SbmvyL3C991IZ3N7Jk5hHPWEsf0geX1pGzkTotCdSgbQPkHkAVxQWkzuxdRWoMMGw2Avwkk%3D) **Source -[britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e66b467064f44eaba13c019adceb0cdd&_e=Qky9mvV7D-V4PvjYP5JCbRsQVRpGywEOlUSXv7_JpnwepVOIoJfqQSgltEuN2cxrdO8tBsvQolPUItazpKiWha1iCyfNgtNIHuzB-mz0gXlGGsMpHFSCSKEZrOlK1lXiiL5qQUp9Y5ABPmqIMQz3HneQtcgiASUoQtvxpuOUXcjPoolzdrCuAxIXYnwNOAtDGmlcQHCIDhfGFgE_WsXzVaYVwguCI0IhPTLvMZkBbj8%3D)**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Endangered orcas are counting on us for their survival
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1759629?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | In the distance across the deep Pacific Northwest waters, a majestic creature swims peacefully among the current, searching for food. She’s a pregnant Southern Resident orca who must consume **300 pounds of fish _DAILY_ **to keep herself and her unborn calf properly nourished! Sadly, **69%** of these pregnant whales _**lose their babies before birth**_ , so if she doesn’t find food soon, her precious calf might not survive... _**But where has all the Chinook salmon gone, Friend? **_ A likely answer could be that the increase in commercial overfishing and bycatch has led to a dramatic loss of this essential food source for orcas. This lack of Chinook salmon can cause **starvation, stress, and miscarriage** at a time when these _**ENDANGERED**_ orcas need all of the help they can get to replenish their fragile population. **[If we don’t take action to restore the Chinook salmon population immediately, these vulnerable orcas could go EXTINCT within the next few decades. Will you step up and DEMAND an END to profit-driven overfishing that’s taking this critical food source away from desperate orcas?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1759630?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1759631?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
After the tragic deaths of Cappuccino, Marina, and Ripple, there are now **_only 73 Southern Resident orcas remaining_**, and the population is at its _**LOWEST**_ since the 1970’s.
These treasured sea mammals are already up against threats like climate change, ocean acidification, and increased pollution. Now, the Pacific Northwest has**lost 159 Chinook salmon populations**(_almost half of the historic salmon runs!_) -- leaving these iconic whales **MALNOURISHED and STARVING TO DEATH. **
But while these precious sea animals are _**suffering and clinging to life,**_ greedy fishing companies continue profiting because U.S. government wildlife officials have __**FAILED**__ to rein in their corporate greed. **Time is running out to demand action from the _National Marine Fisheries Service_ , so we’re counting on 6,102 more activists like you to step up and speak out TODAY: **
[**Please, don’t let these beloved whales be wiped out by corporate greed, Friend. Add your name NOW to help SAVE the last of these endangered orcas before it’s too late! >>** ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1759632?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1759631?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking action. These orcas are counting on us.
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: VPP Voting Rights Fund
subject: the MAGA GOP will stop at nothing to destroy the right to vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we need all hands on deck to stop them >>
| **This is HORRIFIC:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44690?t=6&akid=7534%2E878179%2EcOprC2) Republicans across the country are ATTACKING the sacred right to vote — _specifically for Black communities._

**And it doesn’t stop at the state level:** The MAGA majority in Congress is willing to do ANYTHING they can to keep Democrats from winning elections! [So we’re launching an urgent $12,000 Flip the House Fund to save our democracy from GOP attacks and elect pro-voting rights candidates everywhere! HURRY: Rush $7 by midnight »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44690?t=7&akid=7534%2E878179%2EcOprC2) | [**$12,000 GOAL: RUSH $7 TO HELP ELECT PRO-VOTING RIGHTS DEMOCRATS! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44690?t=8&akid=7534%2E878179%2EcOprC2)
---
Ever since Black voters helped carry President Biden to victory in 2020, Republicans are HELL-BENT on revenge.

They’re using every dirty trick in the book to destroy voting rights — _ending early voting, severely limiting absentee ballots, and even CLOSING polling locations!_

[We REFUSE to let the MAGA mob get away with this. It’s never been more important to elect Democrats who will stand up for the right to vote: Chip in $7 by midnight to help us retake the House! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44690?t=9&akid=7534%2E878179%2EcOprC2)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

| | Peter, time is running out before my midnight fundraising deadline – so before I ask you to help us reach our crucial $25,000 goal, I need to explain why this is so important.

**Experts from CNN to FiveThirtyEight say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and that Senate control could all come down to what happens here in Ohio.** We have the power to win this race, but not without overwhelming grassroots support from folks like you.

I’m determined to keep up the fight for workers and families in Ohio – and to defend our Democratic Senate majority so we can continue making much-needed progress for the American people. **But as a top GOP target for defeat, I simply cannot defend my battleground seat and deliver this progress without you by my side.**

[**_Please, Peter: Before our deadline, will you split $25 or more between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia so we can hit our $25,000 goal and power our reelection campaign to victory? Every dollar counts as we work to defeat the GOP and defend our Senate majority._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62919334/404963027/-843865763?refcode=20230506.2_ShB_5L&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjk5NmNmNC01YWVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_1KtK2uBiS58m4RF8Y5lvq2bGhGHhbwzrwfLc7F_DMU=)

This is without a doubt the biggest moment of our campaign so far. Thank you for joining me in this fight.

– Sherrod

name: Barack Obama
subject: All of these victories add up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team,

Last month, Wisconsin voters resoundingly elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz, a fair-minded justice, to the Wisconsin Supreme Court by a commanding margin. **It was an incredibly important victory for our democracy – and I couldn’t be more proud that A.G. Holder and the NDRC helped make it possible.**

For more than a decade, Republicans have relied on anti-democratic tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression to hold onto power in Wisconsin. The NDRC has tried to change that, making Wisconsin a top priority.

Since 2018, the NDRC has helped break total Republican control of Wisconsin's government – successfully mobilizing Wisconsin voters and advocates, investing in democracy defenders and champions of fair maps running for office, and supporting fair-minded candidates for the Wisconsin Supreme Court. And now Judge Protasiewicz’s victory broke Republican control of the state’s supreme court for the first time in 15 years.

All of these victories add up. This is what progress and protecting democracy looks like.

**I’ve often said that real change happens one person and one community at a time – and we’re seeing that in Wisconsin. By donating to the NDRC today, you can take concrete action to help continue strengthening our democracy nationwide. Will you contribute today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Team, Last month, Wisconsin voters resoundingly elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz, a fair-minded justice, to the Wisconsin Supreme Court by a commanding margin. It was an incredibly important victory for our democracy – and I couldn’t be more proud that A.G. Holder and the NDRC helped make it possible. For more than a decade, Republicans have relied on anti-democratic tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression to hold onto power in Wisconsin. The NDRC has tried to change that, making Wisconsin a top priority. Since 2018, the NDRC has helped break total Republican control of Wisconsin's government – successfully mobilizing Wisconsin voters and advocates, investing in democracy defenders and champions of fair maps running for office, and supporting fair-minded candidates for the Wisconsin Supreme Court. And now Judge Protasiewicz’s victory broke Republican control of the state’s supreme court for the first time in 15 years. All of these victories add up. This is what progress and protecting democracy looks like. I’ve often said that real change happens one person and one community at a time – and we’re seeing that in Wisconsin. By donating to the NDRC today, you can take concrete action to help continue strengthening our democracy nationwide. * Russia **[claims the U.S. tried to assassinate](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quuttx-trhiujldw-q/) **Putin.
* The RNC shows us a **[terrifying look at another term with Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quuttx-trhiujldw-a/).**

**[Biden has now presided over three of the four largest bank failures in U.S. history](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quuttx-trhiujldw-f/) **and experts are warning the Federal Reserve's interest rate regime could lead to additional problems across the sector.

body:

| | Friend, My name is Tori Taylor, wife of Police Officer Josh Taylor, and I am reaching out to you with a heavy heart. Our family has been shattered, and our children, Creedence and Lainey, are growing up without their loving father. We URGENTLY need your help to launch our emergency appeal and right the terrible wrong that has been done to Josh. Josh is currently serving an 11-year prison sentence for a crime he didn’t commit. The injustice we’re facing is unbearable, but we have hope through an emergency appeal. We urgently need your support to fund this appeal and prove Josh’s innocence.Please, help us reunite our family and shine a light on the truth. [Our future depends on the kindness and compassion of people like you. ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcUUGPnCAY_TV40-AH4szBw7bGNtlkk162aS8E4XNkF8RB7HT-faPr9LA38t7jPd5D-dnZ4d6Q-gsBGK1ZCABhTwTg-uvm4_rmn7_lf2fMr-LFVxsJXwlAus_4X3mYFOiVdRtat5lplFADmgybUpwYLzkIno2NFidzRlUP9MT6Ez1jX7JSINac9T0ONLMNUGC0ogIY5QDFMBgtzr1CpAMreU843YMKVd5UjCH4QgefuWZMaV72F3UEugX1GrFQE5qQNgWBbtKzIdCZPk9g8pJVhHVLWKNGqYNBwlrT55soR8_LnAInINbkpUdjV09Ye1TcwY-bhLWTdvLY4KC08rOyl4mwdu9S7a7ShEklGyaJf4Jbt5OxF5uUk0cTGYbBaoxvYRmTujuMso_hHaO6oHzs8sgIU8IpfeTnv7_fX_R79fr6g4CQk7OGsPYTuH8va9XtaXwW159ZbMx8s87ZRdSE08u-qg7-XwAAAP__ut2s1Q) On July 4th, 2019, Josh and his fellow officer, Brandon Dingman, were wrongfully convicted and sentenced to 11 years in prison for a crime they didn’t commit. Their trial was filled with misconduct, and their constitutional rights were violated. Our family has drained our bank accounts, and our legal defense fund is struggling to cover the mounting bills. We have ONE LAST CHANCE to save Josh’s life and our family. By supporting our emergency appeal, you can help us overturn Josh and Brandon’s convictions, reunite our family, and bring the truth to light. Please, consider making a donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more today. Thank you for your kindness and compassion. Your support means the world to us. With deepest gratitude, Tori Taylor

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, My name is Tori Taylor, wife of Police Officer Josh Taylor, and I am reaching out to you with a heavy heart. Our family has been shattered, and our children, Creedence and Lainey, are growing up without their loving father. We URGENTLY need your help to launch our emergency appeal and right the terrible wrong that has been done to Josh. Josh is currently serving an 11-year prison sentence for a crime he didn’t commit. The injustice we’re facing is unbearable, but we have hope through an emergency appeal. We urgently need your support to fund this appeal and prove Josh’s innocence.Please, help us reunite our family and shine a light on the truth. On July 4th, 2019, Josh and his fellow officer, Brandon Dingman, were wrongfully convicted and sentenced to 11 years in prison for a crime they didn’t commit. Their trial was filled with misconduct, and their constitutional rights were violated. Our family has drained our bank accounts, and our legal defense fund is struggling to cover the mounting bills. We have ONE LAST CHANCE to save Josh’s life and our family. By supporting our emergency appeal, you can help us overturn Josh and Brandon’s convictions, reunite our family, and bring the truth to light. Please, consider making a donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more today. Thank you for your kindness and compassion. Your support means the world to us. With deepest gratitude, Tori Taylor | | The National Center for Police Defense is a 501c3 Charitable Institution. All Contributions are Tax-Deductible. National Center for Police Defense 10521 Judicial Drive Suite 200 Fairfax, VA 22030

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8802dafcac234395a88ce0e93951f9da&_e=kPAdOG0ugRoclU-suQUdOO7ZXQwx1QJ5thtJOUPmLgW5OjU_2jG8GJs4Ye3ZAuw1DbGm4mgaX4zlzqLN7l6tfoD88dnPKICUdSROzcCo7z6DdF5M2NJaVoOpVO9Xf1wRZ7WG4xt2D9HxXhAUdKZyPlVhm4lP7Nh3vyPTqJLgFpWJJH7ysS6iJiyEl0id86K3IVJEkrpptAXOGPlrNv8r0FSgFshfO4rfRkhPxTb9r6wDlxath7KO0XYZrGIBkBUB6MPFuoh0yuE9IuC7LeIOo5810KDovpwimiOexlfk5e0%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8802dafcac234395a88ce0e93951f9da&_e=kPAdOG0ugRoclU-suQUdOO7ZXQwx1QJ5thtJOUPmLgW5OjU_2jG8GJs4Ye3ZAuw1DbGm4mgaX4zlzqLN7l6tfoD88dnPKICUdSROzcCo7z6DdF5M2NJaVoOpVO9Xf1wRZ7WG4xt2D9HxXhAUdKZyPh2uvHx0mWvmy9_skKuvV4RauWsOuUZMgEIvkg2Ea96Li8UaKXfyHBCdniME3otyXRtZHIyRwE2EejvIqPvFcMEKFPwJRU2naaX84nErqN0b8he1knTGRfckMGij8QlHWjaRtzGYsNlmyuEBef6wE-0%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8802dafcac234395a88ce0e93951f9da&_e=kPAdOG0ugRoclU-suQUdOO7ZXQwx1QJ5thtJOUPmLgW5OjU_2jG8GJs4Ye3ZAuw1DbGm4mgaX4zlzqLN7l6tfoD88dnPKICUdSROzcCo7z6DdF5M2NJaVoOpVO9Xf1wRZ7WG4xt2D9HxXhAUdKZyPlgpNQSwaVFuXNnU09x0T-y4DnkUYVBTGNDcRKEj66n2uDkN5OBL8nr7zQoLrDK3lZG6qai8mjKbPVgTInvRMS-DfuA5wYqS3nZ3xCseUmTAQVazkrkDouKUpWTNHtyfv5MJPRunjnca9yDLdTgjhpM%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8802dafcac234395a88ce0e93951f9da&_e=kPAdOG0ugRoclU-suQUdOO7ZXQwx1QJ5thtJOUPmLgW5OjU_2jG8GJs4Ye3ZAuw1DbGm4mgaX4zlzqLN7l6tfoD88dnPKICUdSROzcCo7z6DdF5M2NJaVoOpVO9Xf1wRZ7WG4xt2D9HxXhAUdKZyPoP_O-qEpGGO7q54FNTn2eEiouSel8Ylbl5jg7w0JzQcd_99ualg6YSurV0iRcnFuPRmrPiOhSdR7RocARWddAGgxBku1KzsBeOg9jOWA1Q0yu1VggP9JsvAwlK9hGYx9F-_47AUvyipNd3ePF1XzWE%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8802dafcac234395a88ce0e93951f9da&_e=kPAdOG0ugRoclU-suQUdOO7ZXQwx1QJ5thtJOUPmLgW5OjU_2jG8GJs4Ye3ZAuw1DbGm4mgaX4zlzqLN7l6tfoD88dnPKICUdSROzcCo7z6DdF5M2NJaVoOpVO9Xf1wRZ7WG4xt2D9HxXhAUdKZyPged9zNu8254wwZSRgsvYeBPpBTPw84qC7r_MmTbP6ZYYy7kaidluS5Tkk_9ykuoAPXJ3ZuC22xmSKZowtGyjbPR0HURn7TIxkLaMaxOKv0ayChCK-BO9uq-fd789hek46Qg-fhIq1yuf8NcnxlxVKA%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8802dafcac234395a88ce0e93951f9da&_e=kPAdOG0ugRoclU-suQUdOO7ZXQwx1QJ5thtJOUPmLgW5OjU_2jG8GJs4Ye3ZAuw1DbGm4mgaX4zlzqLN7l6tfoD88dnPKICUdSROzcCo7z6DdF5M2NJaVoOpVO9Xf1wRZ7WG4xt2D9HxXhAUdKZyPuzqZma4C10OwGjt0AG8wCaLAuDZfR9FVEvolVK7_f0NOjh1D3u3Z_QO-HAgJTuFPkbWOgZWkQWGjneasc9FIwnqvKSbEFjAULRviNI-om7TAyKZaIihP4vUTe5aFZvv3DFyH2F1h-wpdj6MNNPAcIQ%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8802dafcac234395a88ce0e93951f9da&_e=kPAdOG0ugRoclU-suQUdOO7ZXQwx1QJ5thtJOUPmLgW5OjU_2jG8GJs4Ye3ZAuw1DbGm4mgaX4zlzqLN7l6tfoD88dnPKICUdSROzcCo7z6DdF5M2NJaVoOpVO9Xf1wRZ7WG4xt2D9HxXhAUdKZyPgmjuxYCePYMSrDiaaZufi0tEE1TrzsZyNZmytTZxtJApB8Dsr9Q9FNvloG_eHdQo4fs9EFaBGBUchFlHgGNaU2j8kddEIlbrJg6OK9Cafau1R8m8HpgLw2vWs-kUfzZtYCQlD9ZXrlF270IwwOp_dk%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8802dafcac234395a88ce0e93951f9da&_e=kPAdOG0ugRoclU-suQUdOO7ZXQwx1QJ5thtJOUPmLgW5OjU_2jG8GJs4Ye3ZAuw1DbGm4mgaX4zlzqLN7l6tfoD88dnPKICUdSROzcCo7z6DdF5M2NJaVoOpVO9Xf1wRZ7WG4xt2D9HxXhAUdKZyPu8xb6CDOdFbANByyDqk1x6F4DZSeJbIeVpXOQ_Hkthx415xaOnfBajeiTFO8YdBe-FQJOaUYVPHsWZZQLr1qnaQTnWMSbWs09LfcW9K2GNx6Adf_tFx2cnk3qRdJcg25Y0vURdAhroJj3EmBnhwDD8%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

clean_body: This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: | | | | | What do they have in common?** They’ve all tried to silence me. But none have succeeded. Mitch McConnell even kicked me off a committee assignment because I challenged him for Republican Leader. It is time for Republicans to start acting like Republicans and stop caving into Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer. Join my fight: I’m taking on the Washington Insiders because we need new, bold conservative leadership. I can’t do this alone. Stand with me: | | Thank you, Senator Rick Scott (R-FL) | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.
